1000656221.english: A girl who usually doesn't act cute makes an effort to be cute for someone. No man can resist that.
1000656221.korean: 평소에는 귀여운 행동을 하지 않는 소녀가, 자신을 위해 힘을 내서 귀여운 행동을 한다. 이것에 넘어가지 않는 남자는 없다.

1000656224.english: I get the "gap" part, but what's "moe"?

1000656227.english: Ferro, this song is the one that best shows your "gap moe."
1000656227.korean: 페로 양, 이 노래야말로 자네의 ‘갭 모에’를 가장 잘 보여줄 수 있는 노래다.

1000656229.english: Do you remember the Commander's reaction when, while being petted by him, you tried to hold back the pleasant feeling but eventually let out a happy "nyaang~" sound?
1000656229.korean: 사령관님이 쓰다듬어 주는 동안... 기분 좋은 걸 억지로 참다가 결국 ‘냐앙~’하고 기분 좋은 소리를 냈을 때, 사령관님의 반응 기억하세요?

1000656230.english: Th-that… ah, no, how do you know that?!
1000656230.korean: 그, 그건... 아, 아니 그걸 어떻게 아시는거죠?!

1000656231.english: I have a good friend. Anyway, that's what gap moe is.
1000656231.korean: 좋은 친구가 있거든요. 어쨌든, 그런게 갭 모에예요.

1000656234.english: Then, for the time being, let's practice consistently after closing hours. Since there are songs we'll be singing together, time won't be very generous.
1000656234.korean: 그럼 당분간은 영업 종료 후에 꾸준히 연습을 하도록 하지. 함께 부를 노래도 있으니, 시간이 넉넉하지는 않을 거야.

1000656235.english: Ah, it would be good to ask the Commander to watch before the main performance starts.
1000656235.korean: 아, 본격적인 공연을 시작하기 전에 사령관에게 봐달라고 부탁하는 것도 좋겠군.

1000656236.english: Yes. I should start vocal practice soon, too.
1000656236.korean: 네. 저도 슬슬 보컬 연습을 해야겠어요.

1000656242.english: Huh? Why are orders backed up so much today...?
1000656242.korean: 어라? 오늘 왜 이렇게 주문이 밀렸지...?

1000656243.english: Manager Ferro. We ran out of ice.

1000656246.english: Come to think of it, I didn't see Miss Titania today.
1000656246.korean: 그러고보니 오늘, 티타니아 양을 못 봤어요.

1000656249.english: Miss Titania isn't here today. Do you know what happened?
1000656249.korean: 오늘 티타니아 양이 안보이는데, 어떻게 된 건지 알고 있나?

1000656251.english: Um... I'm sorry. I don't think Titania will be able to come out for a while. Instead, I'll work a little harder.
1000656251.korean: 으음... 죄송해요. 티타니아는 당분간 못 나올 것 같아요. 대신 제가 좀 더 열심히 일할게요.

1000656252.english: Hmm, is that so? That's a shame. The outfit suited you really well.
1000656252.korean: 흐음, 그런가. 아쉽군. 의상이 아주 잘 어울렸는데.

1000656254.english: No. It was voluntary participation anyway.

1000656256.english: For now, I'll go to the kitchen and get some ice.
1000656256.korean: 일단 급한대로 제가 주방에 가서 얼음을 받아올게요.

1000656259.english: Miss Gnome, let me just place an order... Huh?
1000656259.korean: 노움 양, 잠깐 주문 좀... 어라?

1000656262.english: I don't think I saw it today either.
1000656262.korean: 저도 오늘 못 본 것 같아요.

1000656263.english: Hurry up! My blood alcohol level is dropping!

1000656265.english: I will look into it once business is over.

1000656268.english: Now I should go find the Steel Line members— huh?

1000656269.english: This is... a piece of clothing?

1000656270.english: The material is from a bunny girl outfit... and the color is white... but I just parted ways with Miss Azaz...?
1000656270.korean: 재질은 바니걸 의상의 것이고... 색은 하얀색... 아자즈 양이랑은 방금 헤어졌는데...?

1000656273.english: Two high-heeled footprints... If one belongs to Miss Gnome, then what about the other...?
1000656273.korean: 하이힐 발자국이 두 개... 하나가 노움 양의 거라면, 나머지는...?

1000656274.english: ...Well, we'll find out if we follow along.

1000656277.english: It's not really a favor, but may I ask you something?
1000656277.korean: 대신이라기엔 뭐하지만, 여쭤보고 싶은 게 있는데 괜찮을까요?

1000656278.english: Ask me anything! Incompetent Brownie here knows everything!
1000656278.korean: 뭐든지 물어보십쇼! 불초 브라우니, 모르는 게 없지 말임다!

1000656279.english: Gnome... Sergeant didn't come to the café today. Did anything unusual happen?
1000656279.korean: 노움... 병장님이 오늘 카페에 출근을 안하셔서요. 혹시 별다른 이야기 없으셨나요?

1000656281.english: Today was his day off, so he went out wearing a bunny girl outfit this morning.
1000656281.korean: 오늘 비번이시라 아침에 바니걸 의상 입고 나가셨지 말임다.

1000656283.english: And a little while ago, he went to the southern ridge over there.
1000656283.korean: 그리고 조금 아까 저기, 남쪽 산등성이로 가셨지 말임다.

1000656285.english: Come to think of it, his outfit was a bit different this morning too.
1000656285.korean: 그러고보니 아침이랑 복장이 조금 다르셨던 것도 같슴다.

1000656290.english: Those are the footprints we saw earlier.

1000656291.english: They've come quite a way... Ah.

1000656295.english: Looks like someone is playing tricks again.

1000656296.english: Anyway, it's almost time to prepare for opening, so we'll come back tomorrow and catch this prankster.
1000656296.korean: 일단 개점 준비 시간이 다 되어가니까, 내일 다시 와서 이 장난꾸러기를 붙잡아야겠습니다.

1000656298.english: - As I entered the brightly lit cafe, the Sirene... No, the manager greeted me.
1000656298.korean: - 밝은 분위기의 카페로 들어서자 세이렌... 아니, 점장님이 맞아주었다.

1000656301.english: - I'm used to being called "Master." That's understandable, considering that many of the crew members, including the companions and even the battle maids, call me "Master."
1000656301.korean: - 나는 주인님이라는 호칭에 익숙하다. 것도 그럴게, 컴패니언은 물론 배틀 메이드를 포함해 다수의 대원들이 나를 주인님이라고 부르니까.

1000656302.english: - But... When a member who usually doesn't call that way calls the owner "Master"... There's a strange magic in this ordinary word.
1000656302.korean: - 하지만... 원래 그렇게 부르지 않던 대원이 주인님이라고 부르니... 이 평범한 단어에서 묘한 마력이 느껴진다.

1000656303.english: Please sit in a comfortable seat.

1000656304.english: Hmm... A window seat, please. Because it gets a lot of sunlight.
1000656304.korean: 음... 창가 자리요. 볕이 잘 드니까요.

1000656306.english: Thetis, please take the order for the table by the window.

1000656307.english: Welcome, Master. Would you like to order?

1000656308.english: - Thetis snatched the menu from the table and held out what she had brought.
1000656308.korean: - 테티스는 테이블 위에 놓여있던 메뉴판을 휙 빼내더니, 들고온 것을 내밀었다.

1000656310.english: - The menu listed items like hugs, kisses, and pecks. I'm very curious about the special menu at the very bottom...
1000656310.korean: - 메뉴판에는 포옹과 뽀뽀, 키스 등의 메뉴가 적혀 있었다. 가장 아래의 스페셜 메뉴가 굉장히 신경쓰이는데...

1000656311.english: I'm sorry, Master. Hugs are sold out.

1000656312.english: Of course! Please choose a different menu.

1000656313.english: Ah! I'm sorry, Master. Today, we're not selling the kiss because we can't get the ingredients.
1000656313.korean: 아아! 죄송해요, 주인님. 오늘 뽀뽀는 재료 수급이 안되어서 판매하지 않고 있어요~

1000656314.english: Hehe, please choose a different menu item~

1000656315.english: - It does feel like I'm being openly manipulated, but oh well.
1000656315.korean: - 어째 대놓고 유도당하고 있는 것 같기는 하지만, 뭐 상관 없겠지.

1000656316.english: Um... S, special menu is also not available today.
1000656316.korean: 그... 스, 스페셜 메뉴도 오늘은 안 돼요.

1000656317.english: - I was sure this cunning young lady was trying to steer me toward the special menu, wasn't I?
1000656317.korean: - 분명 이 요망한 아가씨는 내 선택을 스페셜 메뉴로 유도하고 있다고 생각했는데?

1000656318.english: Sorry for not informing you earlier. Today, only kisses are left on the menu~
1000656318.korean: 미리 말씀 못 드려서 죄송해요. 오늘 메뉴는 키스밖에 남지 않았답니다~

1000656319.korean: ...그, 그리고! 오늘은 특별~히 시간 제한도 없다구요~

1000656320.english: You wouldn't want to miss this chance, Master, whether it's one hour or two, with Thetis—
1000656320.korean: 이런 기회를 놓칠 수는 없겠죠, 주인님? 한 시간이고 두 시간이고 테티스에게-

1000656321.english: Ah, no, Thetis will be giving you kisses~
1000656321.korean: 아, 아니 테티스'가' 키스를 해드릴 거라구요~

1000656322.english: M-Master... I brought your complimentary drink...
1000656322.korean: 주, 주인님... 여기 서비스 음료를 가져왔습니다...

1000656324.english: — As fingers brushed the cup, Nereid jumped in surprise.
1000656324.korean: - 음료가 든 컵을 받아들다 손가락이 스치자, 네레이드가 펄쩍 뛰었다.

1000656326.english: Master, quickly. Hehe, you're not going to ‘hold back,' are you— Hyaat?!
1000656326.korean: 주인님, 빨리요. 헤헹, 설마 ‘쪼신’ 건 아니시- 햐앗?!

1000656327.english: — As a wrist was grabbed, Thetis's face instantly flushed bright red.
1000656327.korean: - 가는 손목을 붙잡자, 테티스의 얼굴이 순식간에 새빨갛게 물들었다.

1000656329.english: Wait a minute! I was wondering why orders weren't coming in!
1000656329.korean: 잠까아안! 왜 이렇게 주문이 안들어오나 했더니!

1000656330.english: Ah...? Uh, no. Not what you think—!
1000656330.korean: 아...? 으응, 아니야. 생각보다- 가 아니라!

1000656331.english: You can't play around now! We're busy!
1000656331.korean: 지금 노는 건 안 돼! 바쁘단 말야!

1000656333.english: Ah, it's not that it can't be done... but, well... there are a lot of customers... and the party preparations and singing too... ugh...
1000656333.korean: 아, 안되는 건... 아닌데... 그게... 손님도 많구... 파티 준비랑 노래도... 으...

1000656334.english: I, Master... it's not that I dislike it... but we're busy right now, so...
1000656334.korean: 저, 주인님... 싫은 건 아니지만... 지금 저희가 바쁘니까, 그...

1000656335.english: — The Sirene spoke apologetically, making me feel like a difficult customer.
1000656335.korean: - 몹시 송구하다는 듯한 세이렌의 말에 뭔가 진상 손님이 된 듯한 기분이 느껴졌다.

1000656336.english: I-I'm sorry! Because of the café business and party preparations...!
1000656336.korean: 죄, 죄송해요! 카페 영업이랑 파티 준비 때문에...!

1000656337.english: — I gave a wry smile seeing Thetis, Undine, and Nereid standing side by side, blushing and twisting their bodies nervously.
1000656337.korean: - 나란히 서서 얼굴을 붉히고 몸을 배배 꼬고 있는 테티스, 운디네, 네레이드를 보고 쓴웃음을 지었다.

1000656338.english: Yes. It's hard, but it's enjoyable and rewarding.

1000656340.english: After a few days... it seems like we'll have more free time. So...
1000656340.korean: 며칠 지나면... 여러가지로 여유가 생길 것 같아요. 그러니까...

1000656345.english: No, it’s not. It’s my job as a store manager.

1000656346.english: Seeing that they aren't coming back, have the missing employees already been taken advantage of?
1000656346.korean: 돌아오지 않는 걸 보니, 사라진 직원들은 이미 당한건가.

1000656347.english: That's a shame. They were all good guys.

1000656350.english: Just as Manager Ferro said, it looks like someone is playing a prank. It’s a fitting incident for a party.
1000656350.korean: 페로 점장의 말대로, 누군가 장난을 꾸미고 있나보군. 파티에 어울리는 사건이야.

1000656352.english: Hehe, that's right. You can't leave out an event like this on a happy day.
1000656352.korean: 후후, 맞아요. 즐거운 날에는 이런 이벤트가 빠질 수 없죠.

1000656353.english: In a peaceful garden, a bunny girl disappears one by one every night. And left behind is the ominous graffiti that reads "Kill Bunny"...
1000656353.korean: 평화로운 분위기의 정원에서, 밤마다 바니걸이 한 명씩 사라진다. 그리고 남아있는 Kill Bunny라는 흉흉한 낙서...

1000656354.english: Hehe, it's making my heart flutter. It's totally my style.

1000656356.english: Please recognize the seriousness of the situation more...

1000656357.english: I must be taking this seriously, that's why I came out in the middle of the night like this.
1000656357.korean: 심각하게 생각하고 있으니 이렇게 야밤에 나온 것 아니겠나.

1000656358.english: We can't just let all the employees disappear like this.
1000656358.korean: 이대로 직원들을 전부 사라지게 둘 수는 없지.

1000656359.english: It looks like we're almost there. Over there.

1000656361.english: Alright. Miss Azaz, I'll leave it to you.

1000656363.english: What, what is that hideous machine?

1000656364.english: I'm sorry, I made it in a hurry so I didn't have time to pay attention to the appearance.
1000656364.korean: 미안해요, 급하게 만드느라 외관에 신경 쓸 겨를은 없었어요.

1000656365.english: It has a saw blade attached!

1000656366.english: I made it based on a chainsaw. Let's see...

1000656368.english: Three... no, four. Three headed toward the harbor encampment, and one headed toward the Ark.
1000656368.korean: 세 명... 아니, 네 명 이네요. 세 명은 항구의 주둔지 쪽으로, 한 명은 방주 쪽으로 향했어요.

1000656369.english: As Miss Ferro deduced, if someone is kidnapping our staff, one of them must be the culprit.
1000656369.korean: 페로 양의 추리대로, 누군가 우리 직원들을 납치하는 거라면 한 명 쪽이 범인이겠군.

1000656370.english: Alright, I accept the challenge. It is time to show the power of CAFE amor.
1000656370.korean: 좋아, 도전을 받아주지. CAFE amor의 힘을 보여줄 때다.

1000656371.english: I'll try making some suitable equipment.

1000656372.english: Wait a minute... with that chainsaw?!

1000656374.english: Could they have passed by? I want to try using this Trace Tracker Mk.2 quickly...
1000656374.korean: 엇갈린 걸까요? 어서 이 흔적 추적 장치 Mk.2를 써보고 싶은데...

1000656375.english: Perfect timing. The culprit will surely come here, so let's hide and ambush the scene.
1000656375.korean: 마침 잘 됐습니다. 범인이 이곳을 찾을 건 분명하니, 숨어 있다가 현장을 급습하도록 하죠.

1000656378.english: ... What is it? I'm feeling uneasy.

1000656379.english: Heh heh, I'll have to modify this into a Mk.3.

1000656382.english: I can't believe there are so many guys with such intense bunny spirit...!
1000656382.korean: 이렇게나 바니 스피릿이 강렬한 녀석들이 많다니...!

1000656383.english: At this rate, assembling the strongest reverse bunny army isn't just a dream.
1000656383.korean: 이대로라면 최강의 역바니 군단을 꾸리는 것도 꿈이 아냐.

1000656385.english: Ehehe~ I'm working hard again today, poof~

1000656387.english: I guess I should get ready for tomorrow.

1000656388.english: With cat ears and a tail... in a bunny girl outfit...?!
1000656388.korean: 고양이 귀와 꼬리를 단 상태에서... 바니걸 의상을...?!

1000656391.english: It's a luxury to even greet a guy like that. Die!
1000656391.korean: 저런 녀석에겐 인사를 하는 것도 사치. 죽어랏-!

1000656394.english: Even if you make a hologram, why do you do it like that...

1000656398.english: Did you kidnap our employees? I've never seen you before.
1000656398.korean: 자네가 우리 직원들을 납치한건가? 처음 보는 얼굴이군.

1000656399.english: I'm seeing this for the first time too...

1000656401.english: Nice to meet you. I am Bunny Slayer NiBA.

1000656404.english: - Returning from the Ark to the Orca, I came to check out the ecological conservation area because it was noisy... and found a standoff between a Bioroid wearing a mascot mask, Ferro, Arsenal, and Azaz.
1000656404.korean: - 방주에서 오르카 호로 돌아가다 생태 보존 구역이 소란스럽길래 와봤더니... 인형탈을 뒤집어쓴 바이오로이드와 페로, 아스널, 아자즈가 대치하고 있었다.

1000656405.english: Wait a minute. That person... there are restored records.
1000656405.korean: 잠깐만요. 저 분... 복원된 기록이 있어요.

1000656407.english: The restoration order... is from the Secretary's Office. It also requires the Commander's approval.
1000656407.korean: 복원 지시는... 비서실이네요. 사령관님 결재도 있구요.

1000656409.english: - Among the list of genetic seeds that could be recovered from the Ark, there was definitely a name called NiBA.
1000656409.korean: - 방주에서 복구할 수 있는 유전자 씨앗 목록 중에 분명 니바라는 이름이 있었다.

1000656410.english: - I did have the panel taken away immediately after checking the analysis results and uploading it for restoration, but...
1000656410.korean: - 분석 결과를 확인하고 복원 대상으로 올린 다음에 바로 패널을 빼앗겨버리긴 했지만...

1000656413.english: - NiBA came running toward me and splattered onto the floor.
1000656413.korean: - 니바는 내게 두다다다 달려오다 바닥에 철푸덕 넘어졌다.

1000656414.english: At that, I picked up a notebook that popped out of NiBA's pocket.
1000656414.korean: - 그 바람에 니바의 품 속에서 튀어나온 공책 하나를 집어들었다.

1000656415.english: Ugh...! Give me back my diary!

1000656416.english: NiBA screamed and snatched the diary from my hand.
1000656416.korean: - 니바는 빼액 소리를 지르며 내 손에서 일기장을 채어갔다.

1000656417.english: You didn't see it, did you? You couldn't see it, right?

1000656418.english: Actually, I did see the cringe-worthy sentences on the very first page, but I decided to keep my mouth shut.
1000656418.korean: - 사실 제일 앞 장에 있던, 손과 발가락이 몹시 오그라드는 문장들을 보긴 했지만 입을 다물고 있기로 했다.

1000656420.english: Now, King Bunny! You are the leader of the bunny girls here!
1000656420.korean: 자아, 바니 대왕 씨! 네가 여기 있는 바니걸들의 수장이렸다!

1000656421.english: - Blinked and exchanged glances with Arsenal, Azaz, and Ferro.
1000656421.korean: - 눈을 껌뻑이며 아스널, 아자즈, 페로와 시선을 교환했다.

1000656425.english: When I answered, NiBA began to tremble all over.
1000656425.korean: - 내가 대답하자, 니바는 온 몸을 부들부들 떨기 시작했다.

1000656428.english: To think they are spreading the bunny girl look to such an unbearable degree! I absolutely cannot forgive this!
1000656428.korean: 눈에 담지도 못할 불결한 의상인 바니걸을 이렇게나 전파하다니! 도저히 용서할 수 없다!

1000656429.english: I am a person who loves peace and tries to avoid conflict and strife as much as possible, but I simply could not bear to hear this.
1000656429.korean: - 평화를 사랑하고, 다툼과 항쟁은 가급적 피하는 나이지만, 이 말만은 도저히 참을 수 없었다.

1000656430.english: If one remains silent even after having one's beliefs denied, how can one be called a man?
1000656430.korean: - 자신의 신념을 부정당하고도 가만히 있는다면, 어찌 남자라고 할 수 있으랴.

1000656431.english: ...As expected. You're a fool who can't be reasoned with. No questions asked!

1000656432.english: NiBA, having shouted like that, began to run towards us from afar.
1000656432.korean: - 그렇게 외친 니바는, 저 멀리에서부터 도도도 달려오기 시작했다.

1000656435.english: You are really cute. Could I share a hobby with that person as well?
1000656435.korean: 정말 귀여우세요. 저분과도 취미를 공유할 수 있을까요?

1000656437.english: Maybe it was because I was insulted as a bunny girl, but I almost blurted out my true feelings without realizing it.
1000656437.korean: - 바니걸을 모욕당해서일까, 나도 모르게 진심이 나올 뻔했다.

1000656438.english: ...You seem too much like a villain, though.

1000656440.english: - NiBA, who had charged forward, fell as soon as Ferro's monomolecular blade flashed.
1000656440.korean: - 달려들었던 니바는, 페로의 단분자 칼날이 빛남과 동시에 쓰러졌다.

1000656442.english: I didn't even get a chance to step in.

1000656443.english: Your weapon is too dangerous, Captain!

1000656444.english: I was going to shoot it gently.

1000656445.english: - Niba was easily defeated by Ferro.

1000656446.english: - Azaz is... he seems to have lost interest and is looking at the streetlights along the road.
1000656446.korean: - 아자즈는… 흥미를 잃은듯, 길가의 가로등을 살펴보고 있다.

1000656448.english: Surrender peacefully and return our staff. I'm busy with work.
1000656448.korean: 순순히 항복하시고, 저희 직원들을 돌려주시죠. 일이 바쁘단 말입니다.

1000656451.english: Oh dear... it doesn't look like this will end easily, does it?
1000656451.korean: 이런… 쉽게 끝날 것 같지는 않은걸?

1000656452.english: You've actually made me want to give it my all. Not bad!
1000656452.korean: 내가 진심을 다할 생각이 들게 만들다니, 제법이구나!

1000656454.english: Avoiding Ferro's gaze, which seemed to ask, "What should I do?", I turned to NiBA and asked.
1000656454.korean: - 어떻게 하면 좋겠냐는 듯한 페로의 시선을 피하고 니바에게 물었다.

1000656455.english: I'll show you the true power of Bunny Slayer...!

1000656459.english: — …started taking off the mascot costume she was wearing.

1000656460.english: < Bunny? Niba! The Upside-Down Bunny Chaos! > To be continued in the next story.
1000656460.korean: < 바니? 니바! 우당탕탕 역바니 대소동! > 다음 이야기에 계속.

1000656461.english: Once I clean here and wipe over there, it'll all be done.
1000656461.korean: 이제 여길 쓸고, 저기만 닦으면 전부 끝나네요.

1000656462.english: If I just lock the door properly when I leave…

1000656464.english: Eek?! S-sergeant? Since when have you been here?

1000656465.english: I, reborn as the perfect bunny, couldn't sense your presence…
1000656465.korean: 완벽한 토끼로 거듭난 제가 기척을 느끼지 못하다니...

1000656466.english: Hmph… I've become a master, so I can't be caught by my student already… of course…
1000656466.korean: 훗... 스승이 돼서 벌써 제자에게 따라 잡힐 수는 없지... 당연한 거야...

1000656468.english: Ah, yes! Everyone's nice, so I'm enjoying the work.
1000656468.korean: 아, 네! 다들 좋은 분들이셔서 재밌게 일하고 있어요.

1000656469.english: Since you're here, would you like some parfait? I'll make it quickly.
1000656469.korean: 오신 김에 파르페라도 하나 드실래요? 금방 만들어 드릴게요.

1000656471.english: …No, there's a more important issue right now.

1000656474.english: Something… doesn't feel right. So I came to warn you…
1000656474.korean: 뭔가... 느낌이 좋지 않아. 그래서 경고하러 왔어...

1000656475.english: If you say feeling… you mean the bunny's intuition, right!

1000656478.english: On the Orca, after me, the closest bunny is you, Gnome…
1000656478.korean: 지금 오르카 호에... 나 다음으로 토끼에 가장 가까운 게 노움, 너뿐이니까...

1000656479.english: But if you didn't detect it…

1000656480.english: No, forget it… maybe it was just my mood…
1000656480.korean: 아냐, 잊어버려... 단순히 내 기분 탓이었나봐...

1000656481.english: When will you finish the work…?

1000656482.english: Just a little more tidying up, then I'll be done.

1000656483.english: Go ahead first, Sergeant. I'll finish here and leave.
1000656483.korean: 먼저 가 계세요, 병장님. 여긴 제가 마무리하고 갈게요.

1000656484.english: Remember what the Sergeant emphasized during training?
1000656484.korean: 병장님이 훈련 중에 강조하신 말씀이 있잖아요?

1000656485.english: "To be a great bunny, you have to do your best at your work."
1000656485.korean: "자신의 일에 최선을 다해야 훌륭한 토끼가 될 수 있다."

1000656487.english: Because it was the most valuable lesson in my life.

1000656489.english: Maybe on your way home, a parfait…

1000656490.english: Yes, I'll take it to go.

1000656491.english: We just got a lot of fruit cocktail, so it'll be a fresher parfait than usual.
1000656491.korean: 마침 후르츠 칵테일도 많이 들어왔으니 평소보다 상큼한 파르페가 될 거예요.

1000656492.english: A fresh parfait… I'll be looking forward to it…

1000656495.english: This will be the last task.

1000656496.english: The parfait has been made even more delicious than before, so Sergeant Ifrit will be pleased. Now, I just need to head back...
1000656496.korean: 파르페도 여태까지보다 맛있게 만들어졌으니 이프리트 병장님께서 기뻐하시겠죠. 이제 돌아가기만 하면...

1000656500.english: There's someone who can sense the "Burning Bunny's Soul"... impressive.
1000656500.korean: "타오르는 바니의 혼"을 감지하는 녀석이 있다니... 제법인 걸.

1000656501.english: "Burning Bunny's Soul"...? Could it be that strange energy Sergeant Efreeti sensed...!?
1000656501.korean: "타오르는 바니의 혼"...? 설마 이프리트 병장님께서 느꼈다는 기묘한 기운이...!

1000656504.english: I will eliminate every single one of your bunny girls!

1000656505.english: Uh... Was that your purpose you just mentioned?

1000656507.english: How cowardly to try to extract information by leading questions!

1000656508.english: As expected of bunny girls, you're all useless and deserve to die!
1000656508.korean: 역시 바니걸, 살려둘 이유가 없는 녀석들이군. 죽어라!

1000656509.english: That move, could it be...! The one Sergeant Ifrit mentioned in passing...!
1000656509.korean: 저 동작은, 설마...! 이프리트 병장님께서도 지나가듯이 말씀하셨던...!

1000656517.english: It's just… that you talk with me like this, get along well with the sisters…
1000656517.korean: 그냥… 이렇게 저랑 이야기해주는 것도, 자매들이랑 잘 지내주는 것도…

1000656518.english: And follow the owner's rhythm too.

1000656519.english: …There's so much to be thankful for.

1000656523.english: (A while ago, in the VIP room of CAFE amor)

1000656526.english: - While visiting CAFE amor and waiting in the VIP room with a fluttering heart...
1000656526.korean: - CAFE amor를 방문하고, 설레는 마음으로 VIP룸에서 기다리던 중…

1000656527.english: - I knew something was wrong when Titania, dressed as a bunny girl, opened the door to the VIP room, radiating coldness.
1000656527.korean: - 티타니아가, 바니걸 차림의 티타니아가 냉기를 풀풀 날리며 VIP룸의 문을 열고 들어왔을 때 무언가 잘못됐다는 것을 깨달았다.

1000656528.english: - In the tense atmosphere, Titania let out a small sigh and picked up the bottle.
1000656528.korean: - 팽팽한 긴장감 속에서, 티타니아는 작게 한숨을 내쉬곤 술병을 들었다.

1000656530.english: - Titania poured the drink and then closed her eyes, as if uninterested. Leaning toward Leah, who was looking around with a bewildered expression, I whispered.
1000656530.korean: - 티타니아는 술을 따라주곤 관심없다는 듯 눈을 감아버렸다. 난감한 표정으로 눈치를 보고 있는 레아에게 몸을 기울여 속삭였다.

1000656531.english: Suddenly saying they're going to wear a bunny girl outfit... and because I work here, too...
1000656531.korean: 갑자기 바니걸 의상을 입겠다고 하고… 제가 여기서 일한다니까, 그것도…

1000656532.english: - Thankfully, Titania was somewhat swayed by my clumsy persuasion.
1000656532.korean: - 정말 감사하게도, 티타니아는 내 서툰 설득에 어느정도 마음을 열어 주었다.

1000656533.english: - After the atmosphere relaxed as the three of us, including Leah, chatted about various things, I jokingly suggested that we try wearing the bunny girl costumes that are popular these days...
1000656533.korean: - 레아와 함께 셋이서 이런저런 이야기를 나누며 분위기가 풀어진 뒤, 농담삼아 요새 유행중인 바니걸 의상이라도 입어보는게 어떻겠냐고 말을 하긴 했었는데…

1000656536.english: After pouring the drink, what do I do next?
1000656536.korean: 술 따른 다음에는 뭘 하면 되냐고.

1000656537.english: The Queen doesn't know about things like this.

1000656538.english: Oh... um, then should we talk or... oh, should I feed you some snacks?
1000656538.korean: 아… 그, 그러면 이야기를 하거나… 아, 안주를 먹여드리거나?

1000656541.english: - Titania picked a grape and held it out to me.
1000656541.korean: - 티타니아는 포도 한 알을 따서 내게 내밀었다.

1000656542.english: - I didn't have time to taste anything, but I just ate whatever I could.
1000656542.korean: - 맛이고 뭐고 느낄 겨를이 없었지만 일단 되는대로 받아먹었다.

1000656543.english: - Beside me, Leah, equally flustered, was desperately racking her brains.
1000656543.korean: - 옆에서는 나만큼이나 당황한 레아가 필사적으로 머리를 굴리고 있었다.

1000656551.english: The queen doesn't know what happiness or joy is. Because I've never felt it before.
1000656551.korean: 여왕은 행복한 것도, 즐거운 것도 뭔지 모르니까. 느껴본 적 없으니까.

1000656553.english: Still... it's not a bad feeling.

1000656554.english: Yes. That's enough for now. Didn't you say the same thing, Master?
1000656554.korean: 네. 지금은 그거면 충분해요. 주인님도 그렇게 말씀하셨잖아요?

1000656555.english: From now on, we can gradually get used to each other as we spend time together.
1000656555.korean: 앞으로 차근차근… 함께 지내면서 익숙해져가면 돼요.

1000656558.english: ...Since we're on the subject, let's go with you, Master-

1000656563.english: Ahaha… please continue your conversa— Kyaaa!

1000656564.english: …You there, stranger. I'm a little upset right now... because you interrupted a very touching scene.
1000656564.korean: …이름 모를 분. 저는 지금… 감동적인 장면을 방해받아서 약간 화가 났어요.

1000656565.english: Y-yes. I see. I was being thoughtless…

1000656567.english: I'd like to hear exactly what's going on, if that's okay?
1000656567.korean: 대체 무슨 일인지 이야기를 좀 들어보고 싶은데, 괜찮을까요?

1000656569.english: Well then, if you're interested, please come visit the headquarters outside!
1000656569.korean: 그럼, 생각 있으시면 여기 바깥에 본부로 찾아와주세요!

1000656571.english: Phew… That was close… Those two are seriously scary…
1000656571.korean: 휴우… 큰일날 뻔 했다… 엄청 무서워, 이 두 사람…

1000656572.english: Hmm… but she was still polite. She made sure to say goodbye properly.
1000656572.korean: 으음… 그래도 예의는 바른 분이셨네요. 인사도 꼬박꼬박 하고.

1000656575.english: The Queen will go with her.

1000656579.english: Didn't you say she should try different things if she wants to find happiness? And also…

1000656580.english: Rhea, you said you liked the bunny girl outfit, didn't you? So I'll side with that team.
1000656580.korean: 레아, 너는 바니걸 의상이 좋다며. 그러니까 나는 저쪽 편에 붙어주겠어.

1000656582.english: Alright. Then let's make a bet on who will win the master's heart.
1000656582.korean: 알겠어요. 그럼 어느 쪽이 주인님의 마음을 빼앗는지 내기하는 거예요.

1000656583.english: …I'm not sure if being favored by that person is really worth all that.
1000656583.korean: …걔의 총애를 받는데에 그런 가치가 있는지는 잘 모르겠는데.

1000656584.english: Hmm… Are you unsure of yourself?

1000656586.english: Hehe, let's both do our best.

1000656587.english: …Living life by throwing yourself fully into all kinds of experiences like this is more fun and fulfilling, Titania.
1000656587.korean: …이렇게 여러 가지를 있는 힘껏 경험하면서 살아가는 게 더 즐겁고 행복할 거예요, 티타니아.

1000656591.english: I've finally succeeded in my diet…!

1000656592.english: Now I can proudly wear the bunny girl outfit…
1000656592.korean: 이제야 당당하게 바니걸 의상을 입을 수 있겠어요…

1000656594.english: What are you moping about all by yourself?

1000656596.english: Hehe, it's all thanks to you, Night Angel.

1000656597.english: Thanks to that ancient workout routine, I was able to succeed with my diet like this.
1000656597.korean: 그 고대의 운동법 덕분에, 이렇게 다이어트를 성공했으니까요.

1000656598.english: Now, I can proudly go to the Commander and… fufu.

1000656599.english: You should've done that a long time ago… sigh.

1000656600.english: Well, since the diet worked in the end, I guess it wasn't a complete waste of time.
1000656600.korean: 뭐, 결과적으로 다이어트에 성공했으니 마냥 쓸데없는 짓은 아니었군요.

1000656601.english: If you're going to wear a bunny girl outfit, maybe you should visit the Goddess Café with Commander Arsenal.
1000656601.korean: 바니걸 의상을 입으면 아스널 대장님이 여신 카페에 가보는 것도 좋겠습니다.

1000656602.english: I heard they've standardized the staff uniforms as bunny girl outfits.

1000656604.english: Night Angel, will you… ah, that is…

1000656607.english: Ah! I was going to ask how the party preparations are going. Yes. I definitely wasn't asking whether you were going to wear a bunny girl outfit or not.
1000656607.korean: …아! 파티 준비는 잘 되어가는지 물어보려고 했어요. 네. 절대로 바니걸 안 입는지 물어본 건 아니라구요.

1000656608.english: The party preparations are going well, and I'm not particularly interested in bunny girls.
1000656608.korean: 파티 준비는 잘 되어가고, 바니걸에는 별로 관심 없습니다.

1000656609.english: Because I've already confirmed that the Commander likes me just the way I am, and even feels aroused by me.
1000656609.korean: 사령관은 이런 저라도 좋아해주고, 성적 흥분도 느낀다는 걸 확인했으니까요.

1000656610.english: …Unlike someone who ran away at the very end after doing everything.

1000656612.english: I couldn't help it. No matter what, it was embarrassing and I couldn't stop thinking about it.
1000656612.korean: 어쩔 수 없잖아요. 아무리 그래도 부끄럽고 신경 쓰이는걸요.

1000656613.english: That's why I didn't say much either.
1000656613.korean: 그래서 저도 별 말 안 한겁니다.

1000656615.english: Even without flexing… um, it just looks like a bit of "cute belly fat."
1000656615.korean: 힘을 안 줘도… 으, 으음. ‘애교 뱃살’정도로는 보이니까요.

1000656616.english: Ah, Night Angel, would you take a look? I want to know how it looks to someone else—
1000656616.korean: 아, 나이트 앤젤이 한 번 봐줄래요? 다른 사람 눈에는 어떤지-

1000656617.english: Why would I hurt my eyes? No thanks.

1000656620.english: …I'll be looking forward to good news.

1000656621.english: ……Hehe, even if she says harsh things sometimes, she's still my cute little sister.
1000656621.korean: ……후후, 가끔 심한 말을 해도 귀여운 맛이 있는 동생이라니까요.

1000656622.english: Now then… time to try this on. I'm nervous…
1000656622.korean: 자, 그럼… 슬슬 입어보도록 할까요? 두근거리네요…

1000656624.english: Huh? What was that sound just now…?

1000656625.english: Your obsession and resentment toward bunny girls… You could become a fine comrade…
1000656625.korean: 바니걸에 대한 집착과 원념… 너는 훌륭한 동료가 될 수 있겠어…

1000656639.english: I did let the manager know I was coming.

1000656642.english: No! That's not it. Carol is already a wonderful bunny girl.
1000656642.korean: 아니! 그렇지 않아. 캐럴은 이미 훌륭한 바니걸이야.

1000656643.english: She shakes my heart so much—ahem.

1000656654.english: Then... I'll start with a hug.

1000656655.english: ......You mean hugs can sell out too?!

1000656658.english: Alright. Then I'll go with the special menu.

1000656664.english: Ah, Undine. Kitchen work is hard, right? Thanks, I'll enjoy this.
1000656664.korean: 아, 운디네. 주방일 힘들지? 이거 잘 마실게.

1000656665.english: Hmph... Is it really a no-go?

1000656668.english: No, I was the one who went too far with the joke.

1000656670.english: Yeah. Today, I'll just try the menu. Can you give me one of everything?
1000656670.korean: 응. 오늘은 메뉴만 맛보고 갈게. 메뉴 전부 다 하나씩 줄래?

1000656671.english: Sure. Let me know when you're free. I've got plenty of time for a while.
1000656671.korean: 응. 한가해지면 말해줘. 나는 당분간 시간 많으니까.

1000656672.english: Yeah. It's my first time seeing it too.

1000656683.english: Do you know how great bunny girls are?!

1000656686.english: Kukuku… I'll go easy on you.

1000656687.english: Still got more to show? Just stay quiet and join my bunny girl paradise—
1000656687.korean: 더 보여줄 게 남았어? 너도 얌전히 내 바니걸 천국에-

1000656697.english: - I'm hacking into the Orca's computer network.
1000656697.korean: - 나는 오르카 호의 전산망을 해킹하고 있다.

1000656698.english: - The reason is ridiculous. Because the crew members didn't give them any work.
1000656698.korean: - 이유는 터무니없다. 대원들이 일거리를 주지 않았기 때문이다.

1000656699.english: - I guess they thought I could live without working.
1000656699.korean: - 내가 일 없이도 살 수 있다고 생각했나보지.

1000656700.english: - Of course, I have no relevant knowledge at all, but I managed to find related materials by searching the Ark's information section.
1000656700.korean: - 물론 나에게 관련 지식은 전혀 없지만, 방주의 정보 구역을 뒤져 관련된 자료를 찾아내고야 말았다.

1000656701.english: - I navigate thru a sea of code I've never seen before, taking one step at a time. Only one thing, to work.
1000656701.korean: - 생전 처음보는 코드의 바다를 헤치며 한 걸음 한 걸음 나아간다. 오로지 단 하나, 일을 하기 위해서.

1000656702.english: - It's already been blocked dozens of times. But they grit their teeth and find another way. I have plenty of time to spare anyway.
1000656702.korean: - 막히는 것도 벌써 수십 번. 하지만 이를 악물고 다른 방법을 찾는다. 어차피 남는 게 시간이니까.

1000656703.english: - I think I've found a new breakthrough. Before long, they broke thru the blockage and began moving forward again.
1000656703.korean: - 새로운 돌파구를 찾은 것 같다. 얼마 지나지 않아 막혔던 부분을 돌파하고, 다시 앞으로 나아가기 시작했다.

1000656704.english: Perhaps you could take a slightly longer route around that area?
1000656704.korean: 거기는 그것보단 조금 우회하시는 게 어떠시겠습니까?

1000656705.english: Like this. If you continue like that, you'll run into problems before long.
1000656705.korean: 이렇게 말입니다. 그대로 가시면 얼마 지나지 않아 문제가 생기겠지요.

1000656706.english: Kuhuhu. Because it seems you need my help.
1000656706.korean: 쿠후후. 제 도움이 필요하신 것 같아서 말입니다.

1000656707.english: - Certainly, even if not an expert, Alfred might be helpful in this situation.
1000656707.korean: - 확실히, 전문가까지는 아니더라도 알프레드는 이 상황에서 도움이 될지도 모른다.

1000656708.english: - Because I successfully hacked in Guam before and freed the members of the fairy village from their brainwashing back then. Still...
1000656708.korean: - 이전 괌에서도 성공적으로 해킹을 해서 당시 요정마을 일원들의 세뇌를 풀어냈으니까. 그래도...

1000656709.english: Kuhuhu, Commander. There is no shame in seeking knowledge from others.
1000656709.korean: 쿠후후후, 사령관님. 남에게 배움을 구하는 것은 부끄러운 일이 아닙니다.

1000656710.english: Hurry and bow your heads to me and beg for my teachings!
1000656710.korean: 어서 저에게 고개를 조아리시며 가르침을 구걸하시지요!

1000656711.english: - They struggle with inner conflict. Is it a craving for work, or humiliation? At that crossroads of two choices, I...
1000656711.korean: - 내적 갈등에 몸부림친다. 일에 대한 갈망이냐, 굴욕이냐. 그 양자택일의 기로에서 나는...

1000656712.english: Kuhuhu, kuhuhuhu! We can't ignore someone who is desperately seeking help, even after being treated with such humiliation!
1000656712.korean: 쿠후후, 쿠후후후! 이런 굴욕적인 처사를 당하면서까지 절실하게 도움을 구하는 분을 무시할 수는 없겠지요!

1000656713.english: Are you angry? You must be furious! But what can we do? Commander, you need my help!
1000656713.korean: 분하십니까? 분하시겠지요! 하지만 어떻게 하겠습니까. 사령관님께선 제 도움이 필요하신데요!

1000656714.english: Oh my goodness! Leave it to Mr. Alfred!

1000656715.english: - Pushing me away as I writhed in humiliation, Alfred began typing on the keyboard.
1000656715.korean: - 굴욕감에 몸부림치는 나를 밀어내고 알프레드는 자판을 두드리기 시작했다.

1000656716.english: Even the Orca's computer network is nothing but a moment for me!
1000656716.korean: 아무리 오르카 호의 전산망이라도 제게 걸리면 한 순간이지요!

1000656717.english: Please wait comfortably. I will grant your wish, Commander!
1000656717.korean: 마음 편하게 기다리십시오. 제가 사령관님의 소원을 이루어드리겠습니다!

1000656721.english: - Sweating profusely for hours, or rather...
1000656721.korean: - 몇 시간 동안 땀을 뻘뻘흘리며, 아니...

1000656722.english: - Alfred, who had been wrestling with the code, looking like he was sweating profusely, began to deny reality.
1000656722.korean: - 땀을 뻘뻘 흘리는 듯한 모습으로 코드와 씨름하던 알프레드는 현실을 부정하기 시작했다.

1000656723.english: Just a little more, please give me just a little more time...!
1000656723.korean: 조금만, 제게 조금만 더 시간을 주시면...!

1000656724.english: - No, it's okay. Well, let's try finding another way.
1000656724.korean: - 아냐, 괜찮아. 다른 방법을 찾아보지 뭐.

1000656725.english: Something seems a bit off, doesn't it?! Are you sure you said that correctly?!
1000656725.korean: 뭔가 좀 이상한 것 같은데요?! 제대로 말씀하신 거 맞으십니까?!

1000656726.english: - Pushing Alfred aside, who was protesting, I looked at the monitor.
1000656726.korean: - 항의하는 알프레드를 밀어내고 모니터를 들여다 보았다.

1000656728.english: No way! I wrestled with it for 6 hours and couldn't even get close to the firewall... Uh-oh?
1000656728.korean: 그럴리가요! 제가 6시간을 씨름해도 방화벽 근처에도 못 갔... 어어어?

1000656729.english: Please, please don't rush me! Aren't you nervous?

1000656730.english: - I couldn't figure everything out, but it was definitely clear that something was going well.
1000656730.korean: - 전부 다 알아볼수는 없었지만, 무언가 잘되어간다는 것만은 확실했다.

1000656732.english: And like this... If you do!

1000656733.english: - I almost lost my legs from the overwhelming emotion.
1000656733.korean: - 밀려오는 감동에 다리가 풀릴 뻔 했다.

1000656734.english: - On the monitor... The paradise I had longed for so much, filled with all sorts of work.
1000656734.korean: - 모니터에는... 너무나 그리워했던, 온갖 일감이 가득한 나만의 낙원.

1000656735.english: Kuhuhu, how is it! It's all this Mr. Tell them it's thanks to Alfred, go on!
1000656735.korean: 쿠후후, 어떠십니까! 전부 이 Mr.알프레드 덕분이라고 말씀해주시지요, 어서요!

1000656738.english: - With trembling hands, I clicked on the highest priority task.
1000656738.korean: - 떨리는 손으로, 가장 우선순위가 높은 일감을 클릭했다.

1000656739.english: - Soon, the familiar format and dense text greeted me.
1000656739.korean: - 곧, 익숙한 양식과 빽빽한 글자들이 나를 맞이해 주었다.

1000656740.english: - The moment I slowly and deliberately read thru the job description, savoring each word, I realized something was wrong.
1000656740.korean: - 아주 천천히 음미하듯 일거리를 읽어 내려가는 순간, 나는 무언가 잘못됐다는 것을 깨달았다.

1000656742.english: A letter? Kuhuhu, such a trivial task. Are you doing rehabilitation training or something?
1000656742.korean: 편지라니요. 쿠후후, 그런 사소한 일거리라니. 재활 훈련이라도 하시는 겁니까?

1000656743.english: - I quickly closed the document and checked other things as well. Alfred also seemed to realize the seriousness of the situation only then.
1000656743.korean: - 급히 문서를 닫고 다른 것들도 확인해 보았다. 알프레드도 그제야 사건의 심각성을 눈치챈 것 같았다.

1000656744.english: Wait, just a moment. Okay, I'll check.

1000656745.english: - Soon, Alfred's mouth, which had been typing with a tense expression... A thunderous sound erupted from the speaker.
1000656745.korean: - 곧 긴장된 얼굴로 자판을 두드리던 알프레드의 입... 스피커에서 청천벽력 같은 소리가 흘러나왔다.

1000656746.english: No... This, this is a whole dummy page! We couldn't even get past the firewall, let alone... I couldn't even get near the door...!
1000656746.korean: 아니... 이, 이건 통째로 더미 페이지입니다! 저희는 방화벽을 뚫기는커녕... 문 근처에도 못 갔습니다...!

1000656748.english: - While staring blankly at the monitor with Alfred, a "ding" sound announced the arrival of a message.
1000656748.korean: - 알프레드와 함께 망연히 모니터를 바라보는 도중, 메시지가 도착했음을 알리는 띠링 소리가 울렸다.

1000656750.english: - The ominous message notification sound made Alfred and me jump right there.
1000656750.korean: - 불길하게 울린 메세지 알림 소리에 알프레드와 나는 그 자리에서 펄쩍 뛰고 말았다.

1000656752.english: How could I, a mere mortal, dare to open a message addressed to the great commander!
1000656752.korean: 제~가 어~떻게 감~히 위대하신 사령관님께 온 메시지를 열어보겠습니까!

1000656753.english: That's absolutely ridiculous and completely unacceptable!

1000656754.english: - With no other choice, I defiantly clicked on the envelope icon that was displayed on the screen.
1000656754.korean: - 별 수 없이, 보란듯이 화면에 떠올라 있는 편지봉투 아이콘을 눌렀다.

1000656755.english: Please come to the Secretary's Office. Everyone is waiting.

1000656756.english: Oh dear... I'm sorry, Commander. You should go and see it as soon as possible.
1000656756.korean: 저런... 유감입니다, 사령관님. 어서 가보시는 것이 좋겠습니다.

1000656757.english: Then I'll excuse myself first. Kuhuhu, kuhuhu...!
1000656757.korean: 그럼 저는 먼저 실례. 쿠후, 쿠후후...!

1000656758.english: P.S. Alfred, please meet Vanilla in the maintenance room.
1000656758.korean: P.S. 알프레드 님은 정비실에서 바닐라 양을 만나도록 하세요.

1000656759.english: ......?! Me, the maintenance room?! What is this outrageous choice of location!
1000656759.korean: ......?! 저, 정비실이라고요?! 이 불온한 장소 선정은 대체 뭐랍니까!

1000656760.english: Doesn't it seem like they'll keep breaking and fixing things, breaking and fixing things, over and over again?
1000656760.korean: 꼭 부수고 고쳐주고, 부수고 고쳐주고를 반복할 것 같지 않습니까!

1000656763.english: - Alfred stared at the message with a dazed expression for a while, then resolutely reached out his hand to me.
1000656763.korean: - 한동안 망연자실한 얼굴로 메시지를 바라보던 알프레드는, 이내 결연하게 내게 손을 내밀었다.

1000656764.english: It seems this is as far as it goes. It's a shame, but now... It's time for each of us to go our separate ways.
1000656764.korean: 여기까지인 것 같군요. 아쉽지만 이제는... 각자의 길을 가야할 시간입니다.

1000656765.english: - Alfred firmly grasped the hand he offered.

1000656766.english: ... Then, good luck. It was an honor to be with you.

1000656767.english: Alfred squeezed my hand once, then turned and walked away.
1000656767.korean: - 알프레드는 내 손을 한 번 힘주어 잡고는, 그대로 몸을 돌렸다.

1000656768.english: - And I, too, turned my back on such an Alfred... Moving forward.
1000656768.korean: - 그리고 나도 그런 알프레드를 등지고... 앞으로 나아간다.

1000656769.english: - I don't look back. Because I didn't leave any regrets.
1000656769.korean: - 뒤를 돌아보지는 않는다. 후회는 남기지 않았으니까.

1000656770.english: - I don't cry. Because we've already shared the emotions we needed to.
1000656770.korean: - 눈물은 흘리지 않는다. 나눌 감정은 이미 나눴으니까.

1000656771.english: - A man and a robot walking their separate paths.
1000656771.korean: - 각자의 길을 걸어가는 한 남자와 로봇.

1000656772.english: - Although they didn't say it out loud, they each held the promise of meeting again someday in their hearts.
1000656772.korean: - 입 밖으로 꺼내지는 않았지만, 언젠가 다시 만나자는 약속을 각자의 마음 속에 품고 있다.

1000656775.english: < Orca Commander-in-Chief (Unemployed) > Continue to the next story.
1000656775.korean: < 오르카 총 사령관 (무직) > 다음 이야기에 계속.

1000656777.english: Okay, Constantia. Please assist the master from the side.

1000656778.english: Okay, I'll let you know if anything unusual comes up. For the master...

1000656782.english: ... That's a hard story to believe.

1000656783.english: Eva's meaningful words are finally connecting now.

1000656784.english: Adam Jones and Eva... And if the authority ID assigned to the master is Abel...
1000656784.korean: 애덤 존스와 에바... 그리고 주인님에게 부여된 권한 ID가 아벨이라면...

1000656787.english: Even if those worries are true, our relationship with the commander won't change.
1000656787.korean: 설령, 그 걱정이 사실이라 해도 우리와 사령관의 관계는 변하지 않는다.

1000656788.english: First and foremost, our goal is the ruins of the 'Iron Prince'.
1000656788.korean: 일단 우리의 최우선 목표는 '철의 왕자'의 유적.

1000656789.english: Are we still far from our destination?

1000656790.english: It's not close, but it's not far either.

1000656791.english: Oh, and... Our strikers will be joining us along the way. We'll need to change our tactical formation.
1000656791.korean: 아, 그리고... 도중에 저희 스트라이커즈 아이들이 합류할 거예요. 전술진형을 변경할 필요가 있겠어요.

1000656793.english: Let's proceed with Setting up the temporary campsite as planned. We likely won't be able to complete the mission before the party.
1000656793.korean: 예정대로 임시 숙영지를 건설하죠. 파티 때까지 임무를 완수하기는 어려울 거예요.

1000656795.english: We can't miss a gathering where everyone's coming together.
1000656795.korean: 전부 다같이 모이는 자리에 빠질 수는 없으니.

1000656797.english: Let me see that hand again. Looks like you pulled something sneaky.
1000656797.korean: 그 패, 다시 보여줘봐. 아무래도 수작 부린 것 같은데.

1000656798.english: You sure you didn't cheat? Huh~? Salamander!
1000656798.korean: 속임수 없이 한 거 맞아? 아앙~? 샐러맨더!

1000656799.english: Kyahaha! Why the suspicion now? We're all pros here.
1000656799.korean: 캬하핫, 뭘 또 의심하고 그러시나. 선수끼리.

1000656800.english: You revealed all your cards, right? Then I'm taking this round for myself.
1000656800.korean: 패 다 깠지? 그럼 이번 판은 내가 독식이네.

1000656801.english: Uh… wait a moment. I still haven't played mine yet.
1000656801.korean: 어... 잠시만요. 아직 제 거가 남아있어요.

1000656805.english: That's amazing! Wait, do you have a hidden talent for this or something?
1000656805.korean: 대단한데! 뭐야, 혹시 이쪽으로 재능 있는 거 아니야?

1000656806.english: I-Is it really that good? It's my first time playing...
1000656806.korean: 그, 그렇게 좋은 패인가요? 처음 해봐서...

1000656807.english: My four-of-a-kind lost...? No way! I was sure I had it...!
1000656807.korean: 내 포 카드가 먹혔다고...? 그런! 내가 분명히...!

1000656808.english: The odds of that happening must've been insanely low...!

1000656809.english: They said they were taking a break, and now they're already playing cards.&nBut wow, it's been ages since I've seen Salamander lose.&nIs this the first time since the Commander?
1000656809.korean: 쟤들은 쉰다고 하자마자 바로 카드 치고 있네. 근데 샐러맨더가 지는 거 진짜 간만에 봐. 사령관 이후로 처음인가?

1000656810.english: The Deputy Commander and the General will probably talk for a while... Feather, what should we do?
1000656810.korean: 부사령관님이랑 대장님은 오래 이야기하실 것 같고... 페더, 우리는 뭐 하면 돼?

1000656811.english: We should probably wait until we get further orders.
1000656811.korean: 지시가 있기 전까지 대기하면 되지 않을까요.

1000656812.english: Even if there weren't many engagements, it'd be good to check our equipment.
1000656812.korean: 교전이 많지는 않았어도 장비 같은 걸 점검해두면 좋겠죠.

1000656813.english: True. It has been a while since we last did a check.

1000656814.english: We should inspect everything thoroughly. Feather, is the area clear of enemies?
1000656814.korean: 꼼꼼히 살펴봐야겠다. 페더, 주변에 적은 없다고 떠?

1000656816.english: Hand me the spare panel. I'll help with the inspection.
1000656816.korean: 예비 패널 줘봐. 나도 같이 체크해줄게.

1000656817.english: I feel bad leaving it all to you. I should at least help with this.
1000656817.korean: 너한테만 맡겨두는 것도 미안하니까. 이럴 때라도 도와야지.

1000656819.english: Yeah, the one you've been carrying separately.
1000656819.korean: 그래, 네가 따로 챙기던 거 있잖아.

1000656820.english: I don't have it right now.

1000656821.english: Huh? You were holding it earlier.

1000656824.english: So? Starting to see how amazing the Commander is?
1000656824.korean: 어때? 사령관이 얼마나 대단한지 알 것 같아?

1000656827.english: ...Miss Mina asked me to do it.

1000656828.english: She said she needs to study in advance to become a great wife to the Commander, and asked for my help.
1000656828.korean: 사령관님의 훌륭한 아내가 되기 위해선 선행 학습이 필요하다고, 도와달라 그랬죠.

1000656829.english: Can you really ignore such a noble intention?
1000656829.korean: 그 기특한 마음가짐을 못 본 척할 수 있으세요?

1000656830.english: Don't make excuses with that serious face.

1000656831.english: Look at her—her face is redder than a tomato.
1000656831.korean: 쟤 얼굴 좀 봐. 토마토보다 더 빨개졌잖아.

1000656832.english: Things like this should take time...

1000656833.english: Is this person by any chance...

1000656834.english: Her? That's Camel. Her voice is totally different from when she's with us, right?
1000656834.korean: 얘? 카멜. 우리랑 있을 때랑 목소리 완전 다르지?

1000656836.english: Hey, War Wolf! Why are you showing that of all things?!
1000656836.korean: 야, 워울프! 왜 하필 그걸 보여주고 있는 거야!

1000656837.english: You're already watching that video? You're progressing faster than I expected.
1000656837.korean: 벌써 그 영상까지 시청하다니. 예상보다 진도가 빠르네요.

1000656838.english: At this rate, by the end of this mission, maybe... huh?
1000656838.korean: 어쩌면 이번 임무가 끝날 즈음엔... 어?

1000656839.english: A signal from the Steel Bugs...! But this one is...?

1000656841.english: Excuse me for a moment, Deputy Commander. Feather says she found something...
1000656841.korean: 잠깐 실례하지, 부사령관. 페더가 뭘 발견했다는데...

1000656842.english: The detected Metal Parasites are being taken out by sniper fire.
1000656842.korean: 색적된 철충들이 저격으로 처리되고 있다고 한다.

1000656844.english: Looks like they've already made it here. It's a teammate from Strikers I mentioned before.
1000656844.korean: 벌써 여기까지 왔나 보네요. 말씀드렸던 스트라이커즈의 동료예요.

1000656845.english: She's incredibly reliable—uses drones and a rifle to snipe from ultra-long range.
1000656845.korean: 드론과 라이플을 이용해 초장거리를 저격하는, 아주 믿음직스러운 아이죠.

1000656846.english: Hello, Deputy Commander. And I look forward to working with you, Commander Khan.
1000656846.korean: 안녕, 부사령관님. 그리고 잘 부탁해, 칸 대장.

1000656848.english: If possible, I wanted to come along with the others too—

1000656850.english: Ahem, in a hurry, I came ahead alone... Wh-why aren't you saying anything? Did I—Did I do something wrong...?
1000656850.korean: 흠흠, 급한대로 나만 먼저... 왜, 왜 말이 없어? 혹시 내가, 아니 제가 잘못한 거라도...

1000656851.english: I-I'm sorry! I'm so sorry! I'll work really hard, so even if I don't know what I did wrong, please forgive me just this once!
1000656851.korean: 죄, 죄송해요! 죄송해요! 앞으로 열심히 할 테니 뭘 잘못했는지 몰라도 한번만 용서해주세요!

1000656852.english: I don't want to be left behind alone anymore...!
1000656852.korean: 더 이상 혼자 남겨지는 건 싫어요...!

1000656853.english: You're an excellent sniper. To take out that many enemies alone...
1000656853.korean: 뛰어난 저격수로군. 혼자서 저만한 수의 적을 처리하다니...

1000656854.english: But why are you crying at a rock?
1000656854.korean: 그런데 왜 바위를 보고 울고 있는 거지?

1000656855.english: Ullr is so primitive that he can't see anything close by. I think he probably mistook us for him.
1000656855.korean: 우르는 지독한 원시라 가까이 있는 걸 못 봐요. 아마 저희랑 헷갈린 거 같아요.

1000656858.english: There must be a story behind it. You don't have to tell him.
1000656858.korean: 사연이 있는 것 같군. 이야기하지 않아도 괜찮다.

1000656859.english: No, Captain Khan is next in command if I'm not there, so I'll tell you in advance.
1000656859.korean: 아뇨, 제가 없으면 칸 대장님이 다음 지휘권자시니까 미리 말씀드릴게요.

1000656860.english: Ullr was frozen for a long time, barely conscious. I found him by chance and rescued him.
1000656860.korean: 우르는 의식만 깨어난 채로 장기간 동결되어 있었어요. 우연히 제가 발견해서 구해주게 됐죠.

1000656861.english: So... whenever I feel anxious about being alone, the trauma from that time resurfaces.
1000656861.korean: 그래서... 혼자라는 불안감이 들면 그때의 트라우마가 발현돼요.

1000656862.english: Even though I tell him it won't happen again, it's been so long...
1000656862.korean: 다시는 그럴 일 없을 거라 얘기해도, 워낙 오랜 시간 동안...

1000656864.english: I know how painful it is to be left alone.
1000656864.korean: 혼자 남겨지는 게 얼마나 괴로운지는... 나도 잘 아니까.

1000656866.english: Hey~ Mina, Tiamat. I've been looking for you two.
1000656866.korean: 뭐야~ 미나, 티아멧. 어디 갔는지 찾고 있었잖아.

1000656867.english: Seriously, both of you are so careless. Try acting a little more spirited for once—pfft!
1000656867.korean: 하여간 둘 다 "칠칠"치 못하다니까. "팔팔"한 모습 좀 보여줘... 풉!

1000656869.english: Ullr, did you come all the way here by yourself?

1000656870.english: I heard you were supposed to come with the others.

1000656871.english: That was the original plan. But the Deputy Commander said it was urgent.
1000656871.korean: 원래 계획은 그랬지. 그런데 부사령관님이 긴박하다고 그러셨잖아.

1000656872.english: So we agreed to join up as soon as anyone arrived first.

1000656873.english: But... you look taller than the last time I saw you. Have you been growing?
1000656873.korean: 근데 전에 봤을 때보다 키가 커진 것 같네? 요즘 성장하고 있어?

1000656874.english: If you've got something good, you should share. Come on, tell me what you're eating to grow like that!
1000656874.korean: 좋은 게 있으면 같이 먹어야지. 나도 좀 나눠줘, 뭘 먹고 그렇게 큰 거야?

1000656875.english: Kyahaha, you really wanna know that badly?

1000656877.english: Whew... A super long-range sniper rifle, huh. I thought the Valkyrie's gear was impressive, but this... this is something else.
1000656877.korean: 후우... 초장거리 저격총이라니. 발키리 것도 신기했는데 이건 또 엄청나구만...

1000656878.english: Mind letting me hold it for a second? I'll give you a cigarette in return.
1000656878.korean: 잠시 나한테 줘볼래? 보답으로 담배 한개비 줄게.

1000656879.english: Ah! No, you can't—it's dangerous because of the fusion core.
1000656879.korean: 앗! 안 돼, 이건 핵융합로 때문에 위험해.

1000656880.english: And without N, Two, and Tre, you can't even properly... wait, I don't smoke! Don't try to give me one!
1000656880.korean: 그리고 엔, 투, 트레가 없으면 제대로 사용... 나 담배 안 펴, 끼워주지 마!

1000656881.english: So soft and fluffy, just like a little lamb... Makes me want to chomp~!
1000656881.korean: 복실복실하니 꼭 양 같네... 콱! 깨물고 싶게 생겼는데~?

1000656887.english: Ullr, it's okay. They're all good people.

1000656888.english: You don't have to be scared.

1000656889.english: Yeah, don't hide in the back—come on out.
1000656889.korean: 맞아, 뒤에 있지 말고 앞으로 나와.

1000656893.english: Uh... isn't that a bit too brief?

1000656895.english: It's your first introduction, after all...

1000656896.english: Ullr, could you please properly introduce yourself one more time?
1000656896.korean: 우르, 다시 한번 제대로 소개해 주시겠어요?

1000656897.english: There are many people meeting you for the first time, so it might feel awkward, but these are your comrades you'll be working with from now on.
1000656897.korean: 처음 본 분들이 많아 어색할 수 있어도, 앞으로 함께 행동할 동료분들이에요.

1000656898.english: Everyone should know what kind of personality you have and what role you play.
1000656898.korean: 우르가 어떤 성격이고 무슨 역할을 맡았는지 다른 분들도 알아야죠.

1000656902.english: My name is X-02 Ullr. I'm confident in ultra-long-range sniping. After all, that's what I was developed for.
1000656902.korean: 내 이름은 X-02 우르. 초장거리 저격에 자신 있어. 애초에 그걸 위해 개발됐으니까.

1000656903.english: With the military technology of that time, they couldn't realize the plasma rifle I'm using now, nor N, Two, and Tre...
1000656903.korean: 당시 군사 기술로는 지금 내가 쓰고 있는 플라즈마 라이플과 엔, 투, 트레를 구현할 수 없어서...

1000656905.english: ...I can see very distant places, but because of a terrible "primitive" effect, I can't see things up close.
1000656905.korean: ...아주 먼 곳도 볼 수 있지만, 대신 지독한 "원시"가 있어서 가까운 건 못 봐.

1000656906.english: It's not like I'm a "caveman" or anything... pfft!

1000656911.korean: 수, 숨을 못 쉬겠... 큽. 푸하하하하핫!

1000656912.english: Kyahahahahaha! What is this, this is hilarious!

1000656913.english: You're not really a sniper, are you? You're more like a top-class comedian!
1000656913.korean: 너 저격수 아니지? 일류 코미디언 같은데!

1000656915.english: The jokes that nobody ever laughed at... finally...
1000656915.korean: 아무도 웃어주지 않던 내 개그들이... 마침내...

1000656917.english: I am Ullr, the sniper of Strikers!&nToday, I'll be sniping your funny bones—just like Robin "Hoooot"!
1000656917.korean: 나는 우르. 스트라이커즈의 저격수! 오늘은 너희들의 배꼽을 저격하지. 마치 로빈"훗"처럼!

1000656920.english: You're making me laugh so hard I can't breathe...!

1000656921.english: I-I think I'm about to cry...

1000656924.english: Glad to see such a great reaction...

1000656925.english: It's the first time I've seen Ullr's jokes get such an explosive response.
1000656925.korean: 우르의 개그가 이렇게 폭발적인 반응을 얻은 건 처음 봐.

1000656926.english: So the adults really find this hilarious...

1000656927.english: Hehe. Since we all had such a good laugh, we should probably give something back, right?
1000656927.korean: 후후. 덕분에 신나게 웃었으니 저희도 뭔가 보답해야겠죠.

1000656928.english: Here's my secret special collection that I've been saving...!

1000656930.english: Aahhh... To become a great wife... I-I want to see it too!
1000656930.korean: 아으으... 훌륭한 아내가 되려면... 저, 저도 보여주세요!

1000656931.english: Good thing we're getting close so quickly...

1000656932.english: Even if their expressions are a bit wild, they're all good people.
1000656932.korean: 표현이 과격하긴 해도 다들 좋은 녀석들이니까.

1000656933.english: Hehe, looks like a drinking party is about to kick off?

1000656934.english: Hmm... then maybe we should have our own little gathering too.
1000656934.korean: 흠... 그럼 우리도 우리 나름대로 벌여볼까.

1000656935.english: How about it? A drink among ‘phantoms' who've lived a long time.
1000656935.korean: 어떤가. 한참을 살아온 '망령'들끼리, 한 잔 하지.

1000656937.english: If an apple laughs, it's a ‘green apple'! If a banana laughs, it's a ‘banana kick'!
1000656937.korean: 사과가 웃으면 풋사과! 바나나가 웃으면 바나나킥!

1000656938.english: You're laughing so hard my stomach hurts...!

1000656940.english: < Meanwhile, how are they doing...? > END.

1000656941.english: Is everyone still at their seats?

1000656942.english: You've probably gotten somewhat familiar with things after progressing this far, but for the time being, the workload will increase.&nYou'll need to handle your usual tasks and prepare for the party.
1000656942.korean: 요 얼마간 진행해서 어느정도 익숙해졌겠지만, 당분간은 업무량이 늘어날 거예요. 당분간은 기존 업무에, 파티 준비도 해야하니까요.

1000656943.english: Please keep that in mind... As planned, today Constantia and Vanilla will attend to the master's needs, while the rest will handle administrative tasks with me.
1000656943.korean: 그 점 숙지하시고... 예정대로 오늘도 콘스탄챠 언니와 바닐라만 주인님의 시중을 맡고, 나머지는 저와 함께 행정 업무를 처리하겠어요.

1000656944.english: That's all. You may begin work.

1000656945.english: Alice... sister. What's the status of the large bathhouse construction that the informant reported yesterday?
1000656945.korean: 앨리스... 언니. 어제 첩이 올린 대욕탕 건설 관련한 건은 어떻게 되었느냐.

1000656948.english: I just restarted it, so please check it now.

1000656949.english: According to Constantia's suggestion, I've revised the space for the master to be three times larger than before so that those who wish can bathe together.
1000656949.korean: 콘스탄챠 언니 의견으로 주인님을 위한 공간을 현재 안보다 세 배 크게 만들어서 희망자와 함께 몸을 씻으실 수 있도록 수정해뒀어요.

1000656951.english: Ahem. That's a good idea. I'll take charge of overseeing the project.
1000656951.korean: 흠흠. 좋은 생각이로구나. 첩이 맡아서 진행하도록 하겠다.

1000656955.english: Ah... thank you. I'm still not very familiar with administrative work...
1000656955.korean: 아... 고마워요. 아직 행정 업무에는 익숙하지 않아서...

1000656956.english: That's understandable since you've mostly been assigned to the master's escort duties until now. Don't worry about it.
1000656956.korean: 그간 주인님의 호위 임무에만 투입되셨으니 당연합니다. 신경쓰지 마세요.

1000656957.english: This is your first real administrative task too, isn't it, Black Wyrm?
1000656957.korean: 블랙 웜도 본격적인 행정 업무는 처음이지 않은가요?

1000656958.english: When I was in Guam, I was a leader... that is, I helped Lady Cerestia, so I do have some experience.
1000656958.korean: 저는 괌에 있을 때 리더... 그러니까, 세레스티아 님을 도와드린 경험이 있으니까요.

1000656960.english: Yes. You'll get used to it quickly, too, sister.
1000656960.korean: 네. 언니도 금방 익숙해지실 수 있을 겁니다.

1000656961.english: ...Calling me "sister" is embarrassing. You have way more experience than I do...

1000656962.english: Not at all. I'm just happy to have good older sisters like you.
1000656962.korean: 아닙니다. 저도 좋은 언니들이 생겨서 기쁘니까요.

1000656966.english: ......For now, I'll revise it again so it doesn't stand out.
1000656966.korean: ......일단 티나지 않도록 제가 다시 수정해 두겠습니다.

1000656967.english: If Sister Alice sees it, she'll definitely...

1000656968.english: What exactly do you think is wrong when you look at it?

1000656971.english: The cleaning and organizing of the Orca Ho B sector corridor... if I remember correctly, that task was assigned to Miss KeumRan. But...
1000656971.korean: 오르카 호 B 섹터 복도 청소 및 정리의 건... 제가 기억하기로, 이건 금란 양이 맡았던 일감이네요. 그런데...

1000656972.english: This is definitely the master's handiwork.

1000656973.english: To have five detailed plans neatly organized for such a simple task, it's clear you're excited to have some work after a long time.
1000656973.korean: 이런 간단한 일에 방안을 다섯 개나 빽빽히 정리해두시다니, 오랜만에 일거리를 받으셔서 신나신 모습이 눈에 훤해요.

1000656975.english: You remember the cooperation details that were given, right?

1000656977.english: This is for the master's sake. I hope you fully understand that.
1000656977.korean: 이건 주인님을 위한 일이에요. 그 점, 확실히 인지했으면 좋겠네요.

1000656980.english: While pushing too hard isn't good either.
1000656980.korean: 너무 빡빡하게 몰아붙이는 것도 좋지만은 않겠죠.

1000656981.english: We don't know what the unpredictable master might do. Perhaps... they might even try to hack our network.
1000656981.korean: 엉뚱하신 주인님이 무슨 짓을 하실지 몰라요. 어쩌면... 저희 전산망을 해킹하려고 하실 수도 있겠네요.

1000656982.english: ...I hate to admit it, but it's possible.

1000656984.english: Besides... Since the master had the panel confiscated, he must have come directly to Miss Keumran to ask, right?
1000656984.korean: 거기다... 주인님께선 패널을 압수당하셨으니, 금란 양에게 직접 와서 부탁하셨겠죠?

1000656985.english: ...Yes. Yesterday, when I finished my shift and was about to leave, he was hiding around the corner of the hallway.
1000656985.korean: ...네. 어제 제가 근무를 마치고 돌아갈 때, 복도 모퉁이에 숨어계셨습니다.

1000656986.english: Of course, he must have made the next appointment as well.

1000656988.english: For now, give him a small task like yesterday.
1000656988.korean: 일단 오늘은 어제처럼 작은 일거리를 하나 드리세요.

1000656989.english: And from tomorrow, tell him to come to the secretariat at the start of our work hours.
1000656989.korean: 그리고 내일부터는 저희 업무 시작 시간에 비서실로 찾아오시면 된다고 전해 드리고요.

1000656990.english: That's a good idea. I can see the master every morning.
1000656990.korean: 좋은 생각입니다. 아침마다 주인님을 뵐 수 있겠어요.

1000656991.english: ...I'll get the permission. That's all. Oh, and.

1000656992.english: From tomorrow, have them work in casual attire instead of the uniform. It means they should pay extra attention to their demeanor.
1000656992.korean: 내일부터는 제복이 아니라 자유로운 복장으로 근무하도록 하세요. 몸가짐에 특히 더 신경쓰라는 뜻이에요.

1000656994.english: Doesn't Alice unni dislike administrative work...?
1000656994.korean: 앨리스 언니는 행정 업무를 싫어하시지 않았나요...?

1000656995.english: ...Well, she's not particularly fond of it.

1000656996.english: But now it's different. We're not just doing any work; we're handling the master's affairs on his behalf.
1000656996.korean: 하지만 지금은 다르죠. 저희는 그냥 일을 하는게 아니라, 주인님의 일을 대신 처리하는 거니까.

1000656997.english: Since we actually have more time to spend with the master than before, there's nothing bad about it. It's not like the combat missions have disappeared either.
1000656997.korean: 이전보다도 오히려 주인님과 보낼 수 있는 시간이 많아졌으니, 나쁠 것 없죠. 전투 임무가 없어진 것도 아니고요.

1000657000.english: Combat, administrative work, even serving. We, who are the master's hands and feet, must be perfect in every aspect.
1000657000.korean: 전투, 행정 업무에 시중까지. 주인님의 손발인 저희는 모든 부분에서 완벽해야해요.

1000657001.english: If there are any shortcomings, make sure to work steadily on them, even if it means using your personal time.
1000657001.korean: 부족한 점이 있다면 개인 시간을 써서라도 꾸준히 노력하도록 하세요.

1000657002.english: - Normally, the battle maid is solely responsible for attending to my needs, but since I became unemployed, she's been helping with administrative tasks.
1000657002.korean: - 평소 배틀 메이드는 내 시중을 전담하지만, 내가 백수가 된 후에는 행정 업무를 돕고 있다.

1000657003.english: - I'm probably out and about so much that I don't really need anyone to look after me.
1000657003.korean: - 아무래도 내가 많이 돌아다니다보니 딱히 시중이 필요하지도 않으니까.

1000657004.english: - At first, the secretarial office was like a battlefield, but now that things have stabilized to some extent, I heard that Alpha and Armand can finally breathe a sigh of relief.
1000657004.korean: - 처음에는 비서실이 전쟁터를 방불케 했지만, 어느정도 안정된 지금은 알파와 아르망도 한 숨을 돌릴 수 있다고 들었다.

1000657005.english: - I felt a bit bad interrupting busy people while I was playing, so this is good.
1000657005.korean: - 나는 놀면서 바쁜 사람들 방해하기 좀 그랬는데 잘됐군.

1000657006.english: - As I got ready to leave and opened the captain's cabin door, Armand was standing there.
1000657006.korean: - 나갈 채비를 하고 함장실 문을 열자, 아르망이 서있었다.

1000657008.english: Yes, Your Majesty. I predicted you would be looking for me by now.
1000657008.korean: 네, 폐하. 지금쯤 저를 찾으실 거라고 예측했습니다.

1000657009.english: Because my work has stabilized to some extent.

1000657011.english: - Armand, who had entered the captain's cabin and naturally stood beside the desk, blushed slightly when I sat on the bed.
1000657011.korean: - 함장실에 들어와 자연스럽게 책상 옆에 섰던 아르망은 내가 침대에 앉자 살짝 얼굴을 붉혔다.

1000657014.english: So far, there are no problems.

1000657015.english: I've categorized the items you need to check, so please take a look later.
1000657015.korean: 확인하실 필요가 있는 안건은 분류해두었으니, 나중에 확인해주세요.

1000657017.english: - I had no choice but to keep my mouth shut in the face of that bright smile that brooked no argument.
1000657017.korean: - 반박을 불허하는 환한 미소에 입을 다물 수밖에 없었다.

1000657018.english: Yes. It's been quite a while since I've seen Your Majesty as well. Just... I thot we could just chat like usual.
1000657018.korean: 네. 저도 폐하를 뵌지 꽤 됐으니까요. 그냥... 평소처럼 잡담이나 할까 했습니다.

1000657019.english: ... But Your Majesty, what did you want to do by finding me...?
1000657019.korean: ...그런데 폐하께서는, 저를 찾아서 무엇을 하려고 하셨나요...?

1000657020.english: - The expression on Armand's face as he asked that was strange.

1000657022.english: You haven't eaten yet, have you? I will contact Ms. So-wan Yang.
1000657022.korean: 아직 식사 전이셨군요. 소완 양에게 연락하겠습니다.

1000657025.english: - As I got up, Armand reluctantly followed suit, looking quite disappointed.
1000657025.korean: - 내가 일어나자, 아르망은 못내 아쉬운 기색으로 따라 일어섰다.

1000657026.english: - Well... I'll just have to be anxious until I get back from eating. Just a little revenge for taking the job away from me.
1000657026.korean: - 뭐... 밥 먹고 올 때까지만 애태워야겠군. 나에게서 일을 빼앗은 것에 대한 작은 복수 정도로.

1000657027.english: - Whether he knew my true feelings or not, Armand was still diligently calculating future possibilities with a flushed face.
1000657027.korean: - 내 속마음을 아는지 모르는지, 아르망은 여전히 얼굴을 발갛게 물들인 채로 열심히 앞으로의 경우의 수를 계산하고 있었다.

1000657029.english: - He grabbed Armand's wrists with both hands and threw him onto the bed.
1000657029.korean: - 아르망의 양 손목을 잡고 그대로 침대에 쓰러트렸다.

1000657033.english: ... Out of approximately 170,000 cases, all but 8 were...

1000657034.english: - Unlike his usual relaxed and slightly mischievous demeanor, Armand blushed and trembled.
1000657034.korean: - 평소의 여유있고 약간 짓궂기도 한 태도와 달리, 아르망은 얼굴을 붉히며 파르르 몸을 떨었다.

1000657037.english: - After blinking and fidgeting for a while, Armand nodded his head almost imperceptibly.
1000657037.korean: - 한동안 눈을 깜빡이며 꼼지락대던 아르망은, 보일듯 말듯 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000657039.english: ... First, in most cases, kissing... um.

1000657041.english: - Their lips, which had been touching for a while, parted.

1000657042.english: - Armand looked up at me with a face that was both anxious and blank.
1000657042.korean: - 아르망은 애가 타는것도, 멍한 것도 같은 얼굴로 나를 올려다봤다.

1000657044.english: - Still held by my arms, Armand, who had been desperately rubbing his knees, finally opened his mouth.
1000657044.korean: - 여전히 양 팔을 내게 붙들린채 애타게 무릎을 비비던 아르망이 겨우 입을 열었다.

1000657046.english: - Until he fell asleep from exhaustion, Armand's predictions were never wrong.
1000657046.korean: - 지쳐 잠들 때까지, 아르망의 예측은 단 하나도 틀리지 않았다.

1000657050.english: ... Okay. Wait, just a moment... I have to go see the master's face and come back...
1000657050.korean: ...그래요. 잠깐, 아주 잠깐만... 주인님 얼굴만 뵙고 와야...

1000657052.english: - As I was lounging in bed, reading the manga I borrowed from Orangeade, the captain's cabin door knocked.
1000657052.korean: - 침대에서 뒹굴거리며 오렌지에이드에게 빌려온 만화책을 보고 있을 때, 함장실 문이 똑똑 울렸다.

1000657054.english: I just stopped by for a moment while passing by. It's been a while since I've seen you...
1000657054.korean: 지나가다 잠깐 들렸어요. 뵌지 좀 됐기도 하고...

1000657055.english: Heh heh, you've completely gotten used to resting, haven't you?
1000657055.korean: 후후, 쉬시는 데에 완전히 익숙해 지셨는걸요?

1000657056.english: I'm sorry, but it was necessary.

1000657057.english: - Joking around, I got up and poured coffee into my empty cup.
1000657057.korean: - 농담을 나누며 자리에서 일어나 빈 잔에 커피를 따랐다.

1000657058.english: No, I'll just have coffee. Because I have to go again.

1000657059.english: - After that, I chatted with Alpha for a few minutes. Soon the coffee cup was empty, and Alpha stood up.
1000657059.korean: - 그 후 몇 분동안 알파와 잡담을 나눴다. 곧 커피잔이 비고, 알파는 자리에서 일어났다.

1000657060.english: Thank you for the coffee, sir. Then-

1000657062.english: Hmph, this is nothing compared to what the master used to do.
1000657062.korean: 후후, 이정도 일은 주인님께서 하시던 거에 비하면 별 거 아니에요.

1000657064.english: What...? I'm not sure if that's what you meant...

1000657065.english: - Suddenly, it occurred to me that although Alpha had joined over a year ago, we had never spent time together.
1000657065.korean: - 문득, 알파가 합류한지도 1년이 넘었지만 한 번도 함께 시간을 보낸 적 없다는 생각이 들었다.

1000657066.english: - We've been face-to-face countless times, but when it comes to actually having personal conversations or...
1000657066.korean: - 얼굴을 맞댄 건 셀 수도 없이 많지만, 정작 개인적인 이야기를 하거나...

1000657068.english: - And on top of that, the trait implanted in Alpha is 'lust'.

1000657069.english: - For Alpha, who had a sexual desire far stronger than that of humans or even ordinary Bioroids, it must have been like torture.
1000657069.korean: - 인간은 물론, 일반적인 바이오로이드보다 훨씬 강한 성적 욕구를 갖고 있는 알파에게 그건 고문과도 같았겠지.

1000657070.english: ... I'm sorry, Master. I, your servant, have caused you concern...
1000657070.korean: ...죄송해요, 주인님. 주인님의 종복인 제가, 신경쓰이시게 만들어 버려서...

1000657071.english: Still, I can hold on a little longer...

1000657072.english: - In reality, I have no hesitation in sharing love with my comrades, or rather, my precious ones.
1000657072.korean: - 실제로 나는 대원들과, 아니 소중한 이들과 사랑을 나누는 데에 거리낌이 없다.

1000657073.english: - Of course, I try to be mindful of the time and place as much as possible, but if we're really compatible, we sometimes go at it until we're completely exhausted.
1000657073.korean: - 물론 최대한 때와 장소를 가리려고 하지만, 서로 마음이 맞을 경우 녹초가 될 때까지 하는 경우도 있을 정도로.

1000657074.english: ... Master. You know about me, and about lemonade, right...?
1000657074.korean: ...주인님. 저에 대해, 레모네이드에 대해서는 알고 계시죠...?

1000657075.english: Yes... The curse etched upon me is 'lust'. And...

1000657076.english: The intensity will be beyond what you can imagine, Master.
1000657076.korean: 그 강도는, 주인님이 상상하시는 것 이상일 거예요.

1000657077.english: Every time I see my master... You don't know what I'm thinking, do you...?
1000657077.korean: 주인님을 뵐 때마다... 제가 무슨 생각을 하는지 모르시죠...?

1000657078.english: Such vulgar thoughts that I can't even bring myself to utter them... Master...?
1000657078.korean: 차마 입에 담지도 못할 천박한 상상을- 주인님...?

1000657079.english: - I was smiling without realizing it, and then quickly changed my expression.
1000657079.korean: - 나도 모르게 미소를 짓고 있다가 황급히 표정을 바꿨다.

1000657081.english: I know how strong a man you are, Master. Still...
1000657081.korean: 주인님이 얼마나 강인한 남성인지는 알고 있어요. 그래도...

1000657082.english: If I were to receive your love even just once... Even during work hours, meal times, and when you're sleeping...
1000657082.korean: 만약 한 번이라도 주인님의 사랑을 받고 난다면... 업무 시간에도, 식사 시간에도, 주무실때도...

1000657083.english: Even the day after spending all day together... You'll come to want your master.
1000657083.korean: 심지어 하루종일 몸을 섞고 난 다음날에도 계속... 주인님을 원하게 될 거예요.

1000657086.english: - While on a semi-forced vacation for the past few days, I've been doing a lot of thinking.
1000657086.korean: - 요 얼마간 반 강제적인 휴가를 보내면서, 많은 생각을 했다.

1000657087.english: - That spending even a little time with me is what the crew members want, more than me being buried in work.
1000657087.korean: - 나와 함께 조금이라도 시간을 보내는게, 내가 일에 파묻혀 지내는 것보다 대원들이 바라는 일이라는 것.

1000657088.english: - It's hard to let go completely, but I'm planning to make sure I take breaks as much as possible from now on.
1000657088.korean: - 완전히 놓기는 어렵겠지만, 앞으로는 가급적 쉬는 시간을 만드려고 생각 중이다.

1000657089.english: - The alpha, who had been stunned by the flippantly tossed joke, gave a small smile.
1000657089.korean: - 느물거리며 던진 농담에 벙찐 얼굴을 했던 알파가 작게 미소 지었다.

1000657090.english: ... If you say things like that, I won't be able to hold back anymore, you know?
1000657090.korean: ...그런 말씀을 하시면 저, 더는 참을 수 없게 되어버리는데요?

1000657091.english: ... Really, really, I don't have to hold back...?

1000657093.english: - Alpha slowly brought his hand near his navel.
1000657093.korean: - 알파는 천천히, 손을 배꼽 근처로 가져갔다.

1000657095.english: - Soon, with a click, Alpha's thin clothes slid down to the floor.
1000657095.korean: - 곧 찰칵 하는 소리와 함께, 알파의 얇은 옷이 스르르 바닥으로 흘러 내렸다.

1000657096.english: Although I am humble and insignificant...
1000657096.korean: 비록 비천하고 보잘 것 없는 몸이지만...

1000657098.english: - Alpha, whispering in a voice that sounded like it was melting...
1000657098.korean: - 녹아내릴 것 같은 목소리로 속삭인 알파는...

1000657099.english: - He slowly approached me, who was sitting on the bed, and knelt down.
1000657099.korean: - 침대에 앉아 있는 내게 천천히 다가와 무릎을 꿇었다.

1000657101.english: - I was fast asleep when a familiar voice woke me up.
1000657101.korean: - 쿨쿨 잠에 빠져있다 익숙한 목소리에 정신이 들었다.

1000657102.english: 7:20. Would you like to sleep more?

1000657103.english: - As I stretched and sat up, I saw a familiar face.
1000657103.korean: - 작게 기지개를 켜며 몸을 일으키자, 익숙한 얼굴이 보였다.

1000657104.english: Heh heh, you've become quite the sleepyhead lately.

1000657105.english: Here's your coffee and wet towel.

1000657106.english: - I roughly wiped my face with a towel soaked in warm water, sipped my coffee, and watched Constantia's fluid movements.
1000657106.korean: - 따뜻한 물에 적신 수건으로 대충 얼굴을 닦고, 커피를 홀짝이며 콘스탄챠의 물흐르는듯한 움직임을 구경했다.

1000657107.english: - Tidy up the slightly messy desk, sweep and mop the floor, and get a new sheet from under the bed...
1000657107.korean: - 약간 어질러진 책상을 정리하고, 바닥을 쓸고 닦고, 침대 아래에서 새 시트를 꺼내서...

1000657109.english: - I got out of bed and moved to my desk. I remember arguing with Constantia, who insisted on cleaning up after I left, even if it meant she had to die.
1000657109.korean: - 침대에서 일어나 책상으로 자리를 옮겼다. 죽어도 내가 자리를 비웠을때 정리하겠다는 콘스탄챠와 괜찮다고 실랑이를 벌였던 기억이 떠오른다.

1000657110.english: Then, Master, have a good day.

1000657111.english: - I grabbed Constantia, who was about to leave the captain's cabin after emptying the trash can.
1000657111.korean: - 쓰레기통까지 비우고 함장실을 나가려는 콘스탄챠를 붙잡았다.

1000657114.english: - At my question, Constantia followed me as if it were the most natural thing in the world.
1000657114.korean: - 내 물음에 콘스탄챠는 당연하다는듯이 나를 따라 나섰다.

1000657115.english: - They arrived at the Ark's ecological preservation zone, which had recently opened, arm in arm.
1000657115.korean: - 다정하게 팔짱을 끼고 얼마 전에 개방된 방주의 생태 보존 구역에 도착했다.

1000657117.english: Heh heh, yes. I'm really happy.

1000657119.english: - We watched the fountain together, bought snacks from the newly opened cafe, and headed to a quiet spot under the trees.
1000657119.korean: - 함께 분수를 구경하고, 개점한 카페에서 간식거리를 사들고 한적한 나무그늘로 향했다.

1000657122.english: - We sat with our backs against the tree, sharing the slice of cake we had brought back.
1000657122.korean: - 포장해온 조각케익을 나눠먹으며 나무에 등을 기대고 앉았다.

1000657123.english: - Constantia, who had sat down beside me, carefully rested her head on my shoulder.
1000657123.korean: - 날 따라 앉은 콘스탄챠가 조심스럽게 어깨에 머리를 올렸다.

1000657126.english: - With Constantia's answer, a comfortable silence fell.
1000657126.korean: - 콘스탄챠의 대답과 함께 편안한 침묵이 내려앉았다.

1000657127.english: - A comfortable silence, not at all awkward, the kind only those who have shared their hearts can experience.
1000657127.korean: - 조금도 어색하지 않은, 서로 마음을 나눈 사이만이 가질 수 있는 기분 좋은 침묵.

1000657128.english: - In that soft atmosphere, I suddenly voiced a thot that came to mind.
1000657128.korean: - 그런 부드러운 분위기 속에서 문득 떠오르는 생각을 입에 담았다.

1000657129.english: What I want to do...? Hmm...

1000657130.english: - After a moment of thought, with her index finger to her lips, Constantia smiled broadly.
1000657130.korean: - 한동안 검지 손가락을 입가에 대고 생각하던 콘스탄챠가 활짝 웃었다.

1000657132.english: Heh heh, there's a lot of good information in the Ark. There's a variety of things that are good for men, from food to exercise and fashion.
1000657132.korean: 후후, 방주에 좋은 정보가 많더라구요. 남성에게 좋은 음식부터, 운동, 패션까지 다양해요.

1000657133.english: Of course, others may be thinking about this as well, but wouldn't it be good if we could all talk about it together?
1000657133.korean: 물론 다른 분들께서도 생각하고 계시겠지만, 다같이 이야기해보면 좋잖아요?

1000657134.english: So, when I have some free time, I want to have a meeting to select the good information from those and present it to the master.
1000657134.korean: 그래서 여유될때 회의를 해서 그런 정보들 중에 좋은 것들을 뽑아서 주인님께 해드리고 싶어요.

1000657137.english: - Whether she understood the hidden meaning in my words, Constantia laughed awkwardly.
1000657137.korean: - 내 말에 숨은 의미를 깨달았는지, 콘스탄챠는 난처하게 웃었다.

1000657139.english: It's true. I like things just the way they are now. Serving the master.
1000657139.korean: 진짜에요. 저는 지금 이대로가 좋아요. 주인님의 시중을 드는 거요.

1000657140.english: - Slowly rising, Constantia looked at the distant members.
1000657140.korean: - 천천히 몸을 일으킨 콘스탄챠가 멀리 보이는 대원들을 바라봤다.

1000657141.english: Back then, I used to do a lot of other things, didn't I? I made a lot of mistakes, but...
1000657141.korean: 예전에는 제가 다른 일도 많이 했었잖아요? 실수도 많이 했지만...

1000657142.english: But now there are many people who are much better than me.
1000657142.korean: 그런데 지금은 저보다 훨씬 더 뛰어나신 분들이 많이 계세요.

1000657143.english: Combat, work assistance, cooking, and so on... It would be more helpful for the master if they took care of it.
1000657143.korean: 전투, 업무 보조, 요리 등등... 그분들이 맡아주시는 게 주인님에게 더 도움이 돼요.

1000657145.english: Isn't it still my role to serve you, Master? I'm confident I can do it better than anyone else.
1000657145.korean: 주인님의 시중은 여전히 제 역할인걸요? 누구보다도 잘 할 자신 있다구요.

1000657146.english: - That's inevitable. Constantia has been... since I woke up. Because even this morning, right up until now, you've been waiting on me constantly.
1000657146.korean: - 그럴수밖에. 콘스탄챠는 내가 깨어났을때부터... 당장 오늘 아침까지도 줄곧, 내 시중을 들어왔으니까.

1000657149.english: - Constantia was crying with a surprised expression.
1000657149.korean: - 콘스탄챠는 놀란 얼굴로 눈물을 흘리고 있었다.

1000657150.english: I'm sorry, I'm sorry. It's not something I deserve to be thanked for, I just did what was natural... Why are there tears...?
1000657150.korean: 죄, 죄송해요. 고맙다는 말을 들을만한 것도 아닌데, 당연한 일을 한 것 뿐인데... 왜 눈물이...

1000657151.english: - I silently embraced Constantia, who was wiping away her tears with an awkward smile.
1000657151.korean: - 멋쩍게 웃으며 눈물을 닦는 콘스탄챠를 말없이 품에 안아 주었다.

1000657153.english: - After calming down and remaining in his embrace for a long time, Constantia suddenly spoke.
1000657153.korean: - 진정하고 나서도 한참동안 안겨있던 콘스탄챠가 문득 입을 열었다.

1000657155.english: Um... I think I know why I cried.
1000657155.korean: 저... 왜 눈물이 났는지 알 것 같아요.

1000657156.english: I... I was really, really happy.

1000657157.english: I just did what I was supposed to do, but since my beloved master is thanking me, I feel very happy. And...
1000657157.korean: 제가 당연히 해야하는 일을 해야 했을 뿐인데, 사랑하는 주인님께서 고맙다고 해주시니까요. 그리고...

1000657159.english: I tried to act like it wasn't, but... I guess I was a little anxious deep down.
1000657159.korean: 아닌 척 말씀드렸지만... 마음 한 구석에서는 불안했었나봐요.

1000657160.english: Am I no longer useful? I wonder if my master doesn't need me anymore... And then.
1000657160.korean: 나는 더이상 쓸모 없는 게 아닐까. 주인님께선 나를 더이상 필요로 하지 않으시는 게 아닐까... 하고요.

1000657162.english: Keep going. I will be by your side until the end of this world, Master.
1000657162.korean: 앞으로도 계속. 이 세상이 끝날 때까지 곁에 있을게요, 주인님.

1000657163.english: Lately, you seem to be with other people more often in the mornings, don't you?
1000657163.korean: 요새는 아침에 다른 분들이랑 계실 때가 더 많으신걸요?

1000657164.english: - I pulled away and kissed Constantia's lips lightly, who was feigning a look of dissatisfaction.
1000657164.korean: - 얼굴을 떼고 짐짓 불만스러운 표정을 짓는 콘스탄챠의 입술에 살짝 입을 맞췄다.

1000657165.english: Seeing Constantia smile so brightly, as if just that alone made her incredibly happy, warmed my heart as well.
1000657165.korean: - 단지 그것만으로도 너무나 행복하다는듯 활짝 웃는 콘스탄챠를 보며, 나도 마음이 따뜻해졌다.

1000657167.english: Tonight... Do you have any other plans...?

1000657169.english: I'm sorry, I'm sorry. I shouldn't have said that...

1000657170.english: ... You're mischievous. You weren't like this before.

1000657171.english: - Nagging, pretending to be sulky, or just naturally cuddling like this... It was a side of Constantia that couldn't be found in the old days.
1000657171.korean: - 잔소리를 하거나, 삐진 척을 하거나, 이렇게 자연스럽게 품에 안기는 건... 예전의 콘스탄챠에게선 찾아볼 수 없는 모습이었다.

1000657172.english: - Compared to back then, when I always smiled brightly, never said anything I didn't like, and just did what I was supposed to... I think the Constantia of today is much more 'human'.
1000657172.korean: - 항상 방긋방긋 웃고, 싫은 소리는 절대로 하지 않고 할 일만 했던 그때에 비하면... 지금의 콘스탄챠는 훨씬 '인간적'이라고 생각한다.

1000657173.english: That's because the master is becoming more and more sly every day.

1000657175.english: - Constantia, who had been smiling and exchanging light jokes, blushed slightly, as if lost in thought.
1000657175.korean: - 가벼운 농담을 하며 마주 웃던 콘스탄챠는, 무슨 생각을 했는지 살짝 얼굴을 붉혔다.

1000657178.english: - Perhaps because of the current atmosphere, I naturally thot of a bunny girl, but Constantia, in her usual way, said something very Constantia-like.
1000657178.korean: - 요새 분위기 때문인지 나는 자연스럽게 바니걸을 떠올렸지만, 콘스탄챠는 콘스탄챠다운 말을 내놓았다.

1000657179.english: That outfit the master really loved... How is it?
1000657179.korean: 주인님이 엄청 좋아해주셨던 그 옷... 어떠세요?

1000657182.english: He recalled the nite he spent with Constantia, her hair down and wearing a thin nightdress.
1000657182.korean: - 머리를 풀어내리고, 얇은 나이트 드레스를 걸친 콘스탄챠와 보냈던 밤을 떠올렸다.

1000657183.english: Um... That was really nice back then. Because I've never seen a master so lacking in leisure before.
1000657183.korean: 저... 그때 정말 좋았어요. 그렇게 여유가 없으신 주인님은 처음 봤으니까요.

1000657184.english: Seeing how desperately you want me... Oh, my master wants me so much, loves me so much... I was thinking...
1000657184.korean: 정신없이 저를 원해주시는 걸 보고... 아, 주인님께서는 이렇게나 나를 원해주시는구나, 이렇게나 사랑해주시는구나... 하는 생각이 들어서...

1000657186.english: - As if by agreement, we stood up from our seats together.
1000657186.korean: - 약속이라도 한 것 처럼 함께 자리에서 일어났다.

1000657187.english: - He naturally clasped hands and headed toward the captain's cabin at a slightly faster pace.
1000657187.korean: - 자연스럽게 손을 깍지 끼고, 조금은 빠른 걸음으로 함장실로 향했다.

1000657188.english: - Constantia is more devoted at night than when she's serving, but I won't tolerate it just for today.
1000657188.korean: - 밤에는 시중을 들 때보다도 헌신적인 콘스탄챠이지만, 오늘만은 용납하지 않을 생각이다.

1000657189.english: - To the maid who only looks at me and says I am the reason for her life...
1000657189.korean: - 오직 나만을 바라보고, 내가 삶의 이유라는 메이드 아가씨에게...

1000657190.english: - Because I need to show you how much I love myself.
1000657190.korean: - 내가 자신을 얼마나 사랑하는지 알려줘야 하니까.

1000657192.english: - One day, in the middle of the night.

1000657193.english: - I am wandering thru the forest.
