1000657194.english: - The reason was a letter wedged in the crack of the captain's cabin door.
1000657194.korean: - 이유는 함장실 문틈에 끼워져 있던 편지 한 통 때문.

1000657195.english: -  It only had a roughly drawn map and the appointment time written on it, but somehow, seeing the sender's name at the bottom of the letter made it all make sense.
1000657195.korean: - 적당히 그린 약도와 약속 시간만 적혀있었지만, 편지 아래쪽의 발신자 이름을 보니 어쩐지 납득할 수 있었다.

1000657196.english: -  Just as the thought that I might be getting stranded began to creep in, a clearing appeared in the middle of the dense forest.
1000657196.korean: - 슬슬 조난당하는 게 아닐까 하는 생각이 피어오를 무렵, 빽빽한 숲 중간에 공터가 나타났다.

1000657197.english: - And the piano inexplicably placed in the middle of that empty lot, and the sender who sent me the letter too.
1000657197.korean: - 그리고 그 공터 중앙에 뜬금없이 놓여 있는 피아노와, 내게 편지를 보낸 발신인도.

1000657199.english: Please wait a moment. I'm just finishing up the tuning.

1000657200.english: You need it if you want to sing.

1000657202.english: To the commander... Oh my. Did I perhaps not write it in the letter?
1000657202.korean: 사령관한테- 어머. 혹시 제가 편지에 안 적었나요?

1000657205.english: - The urge to complain vanished at Azaz's slightly embarrassed, awkward smile.
1000657205.korean: - 살짝 부끄러움이 감도는, 아자즈의 난처한 웃음에 불평할 기분은 사라져 버렸다.

1000657206.english: It's about playing a song for someone you like, so of course it's exciting.
1000657206.korean: 좋아하는 사람한테 노래를 들려주는건데, 당연히 설레죠.

1000657207.english: And those insensitive words, do they hurt? Because I'm a woman too.
1000657207.korean: 그리고 그런 무신경한 말, 상처받는다구요? 저도 여자니까.

1000657208.english: It's okay. Actually, I'm not that hurt.
1000657208.korean: 괜찮아요. 사실 그렇게 상처 받지는 않아요.

1000657209.english: Because I know very well that the commander is a kind and gentle person.
1000657209.korean: 사령관은 상냥하고 다정한 사람이란 거, 잘 알고 있으니까요.

1000657210.english: - While I was still reeling from the one-two punch, Azaz, having finished tuning, stood up and gently pressed the keys.
1000657210.korean: - 내가 원투펀치에 정신을 차리지 못하고 있을때, 조율을 끝냈는지 아자즈는 일어나서 건반을 부드럽게 눌렀다.

1000657213.english: - The clear sound of the piano echoed thru the forest where starlight was falling.
1000657213.korean: - 투명한 피아노 소리가 별빛이 내리는 숲 속에 울렸다.

1000657214.english: - Without even having time to be flustered by the sudden start, Azaz's clear voice joins the piano melody.
1000657214.korean: - 갑작스러운 시작에 당황할 새도 없이, 피아노 선율에 아자즈의 맑은 목소리가 더해진다.

1000657215.english: - Although his voice trembled slightly compared to his perfect performance, it didn't bother me at all.
1000657215.korean: - 완벽한 연주에 비해 목소리는 살짝 떨렸지만, 전혀 신경쓰이지 않았다.

1000657216.english: - Because Azaz, singing with a slight smile against the backdrop of starlight, truly looked happy.
1000657216.korean: - 별빛을 배경으로, 살짝 미소를 머금고 노래하는 아자즈가 정말로 기뻐보였으니까.

1000657217.english: - As the song ended, leaving them seemingly the only two people in a white world, Azaz, who had let out a small breath, smiled brightly.
1000657217.korean: - 하얀 세상에 단 둘만이 남겨진듯한 노래가 끝나고, 작게 숨을 내쉰 아자즈가 방긋 웃었다.

1000657219.english: Heh heh, it was worth it to modify the piano. Playing just the piano accompaniment was getting boring, so I made it so that the MR automatically plays along with my performance.
1000657219.korean: 후후, 피아노를 개조한 보람이 있었네요. 피아노 반주만 하면 영 심심해서 제 연주에 따라 자동으로 MR이 재생되게 만들었어요.

1000657221.english: - Azaz laughed awkwardly and idly brushed his hand over the keyboard.
1000657221.korean: - 아자즈는 난처하게 웃으며 괜히 건반을 쓸었다.

1000657222.english: The song is... Honestly, I wasn't confident.

1000657223.english: I'm the type to get so absorbed in one thing that I don't see anything else, so I was so focused on piano practice that I didn't even think about practicing singing.
1000657223.korean: 저는 하나에 몰입하면 다른 게 안 보이는 성격이라, 피아노 연습만 생각하고 노래 연습할 생각을 미처 못했어요.

1000657224.english: And on top of that, I was going to play it for the commander, but I only heard the melody and chose a breakup song.
1000657224.korean: 거기다 사령관에게 들려줄거였는데, 멜로디만 듣고 이별 노래를 골라버렸고요.

1000657225.english: Really... I'm making mistake after mistake. Foolishly.

1000657227.english: - It wasn't the same as saying it was okay because he could feel the sincerity, but Azaz smiled as if that was enough.
1000657227.korean: - 진심이 느껴져서 괜찮았다는 말 대신이었지만, 아자즈는 그걸로 충분하다는듯 웃어주었다.

1000657228.english: Commander, could you come over here for a moment?

1000657230.english: - I sat quietly beside him as instructed, and Azaz grabbed my hand and placed it on the keyboard.
1000657230.korean: - 시키는대로 얌전히 옆에 앉자, 아자즈는 내 손을 붙잡고 건반 위에 올려주었다.

1000657232.english: It's okay. The keys you need to press will light up. Okay.
1000657232.korean: 괜찮아요. 쳐야되는 건반에 불이 들어올거예요. 자.

1000657233.english: - As Azaz said, the piano keys sparkled.
1000657233.korean: - 아자즈의 말대로 피아노 건반이 반짝 빛났다.
